title: Node Developer
description:
* Application Deadline: April 6, 2026
* Kista
* Hybrid
**Job Description**
-------------------

*Are you a seasoned Node developer who values stability over startup chaos? Join our Broadband Provisioning team at Tele2, where we keep Sweden connected — not through cables and routers, but by making sure every thousands broadband order flows smoothly from start to finish. You’ll work in a pragmatic environment that values reliability, simplicity, and long-term impact over buzzwords and hype.*

**About the job**

As a senior Node developer, you will be part of a team that develops and maintains the solutions around our broadband business. You will contribute to constantly improving our code base working with modern technologies like Node/Typescript and Kubernetes.


The team has responsibility for a variety of systems reaching from the network side to the frontend. The role requires that you can take on different tasks dependent on the current priorities.


**Who are you?**  

You are a pragmatic developer who enjoys taking ownership of features from concept to deployment. With a solid foundation in the modern web stack, you thrive in a collaborative environment and are driven to ship clean, scalable, and reliable code.


**To be successful in this role, we think that you:**

* Have solid experience in Node.js/Typescript
* Have good knowledge about databases, e.g. MySQL
* Are comfortable deploying in Docker/Kubernetes
* Are familiar with frontend technologies like Angular (and Vue and React)
* Are comfortable using Linux

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with messaging/streaming technologies like Kafka
* Experience with tools like Redis or Elastic Search
**Great Place to Work**
-----------------------

* Pension and health care
* Hybrid and flexible work life balance
* Career opportunities
* Parental benefit
* Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
* Inclusive workplace
**Skills & Requirements**
-------------------------

**A few words from the manager**

I*’m Anders Sundquist, Group Manager for the Broadband Provisioning team. We’re a small, down-to-earth group that values clarity, autonomy, and doing things properly. This is a role for someone who enjoys solving real operational problems — and who wants to build something stable for the long run*.



**Interest and application**  

Would you like to be a part of the Tele2s value-driven and including culture? Then hit the “apply now” button and let’s find out if we’re a match!


Please note that in compliance with personal data management regulations (GDPR), we are unable to accept CVs via email.


Warmly welcome to submit your application! To ensure an inclusive and fair recruitment process, we focus on your experiences and skills. Therefore, Tele2 has chosen not to consider cover letters. Instead, we kindly ask you to answer the screening questions included in the application form.



As a step in the recruitment process, Tele2 performs a background check on final candidates.


**Work with great people**
--------------------------

Emma
Digital Capabilities & Technology
*"Everyone at Tele2 always aim for the stars in order to create unlimited possibilities."*
Fanny
Systemspecialist Unified Communications
*"The work environment at Tele2 supports both personal and professional development, and there are significant opportunities for further career advancement"*
**About the company**
---------------------

At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.


Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.


Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.  



  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video
company_description: We enable the transformation of businesses and the creation of tomorrow’s infrastructure. Connecting people and technology far and wide, as well as right here around us. Simple. Sustainable. Smart.

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
**Do you want to build B2C solutions that are used at scale – and actually matter to end users?**
 As a Fullstack Developer at GlobalConnect, you will be part of a team that owns the full B2C portal experience, from frontend to backend.
   

  

 If you enjoy variety, responsibility, and building solutions that are continuously evolving, this is a role where you can really make your mark. The role combines new development, integrations, and continuous improvement in a high-impact B2C environment. You will work across the entire value chain. Close collaboration with stakeholders, users, and business teams is a natural part of your day, and you combine technical insight with a strong sense of ownership. You will work in an agile setup, collaborating daily with other developers, product owners, and you take responsibility for both delivery and quality.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain B2C portals using modern frontend and backend technologies
* Work end-to-end with both frontend and backend development
* Build customer-specific portal solutions on top of a shared platform base
* Design and implement REST APIs and integrations with third-party systems
* Collaborate closely with business stakeholders and users to shape solutions
* Contribute actively in agile ceremonies and continuous delivery


**What You Need To Succeed**
* Strong experience in modern Spring Boot microservice development (Java, preferably Java 21)
* Solid experience designing and working with REST APIs
* Experience with Angular 20 for frontend development
* Experience working with Git and agile methodologies (Scrum)


 Beyond the technical skills, you are comfortable working in a stakeholder-heavy environment and enjoy being part of discussions that span both technology and business. Experience with designing and developing accessible digital solutions with a clear understanding of WCAG compliance is a plus, but not required.
   

  

**The team & collaboration**
 You will join a fullstack team with mixed seniority and strong collaboration. The team is distributed across several locations and works closely together using agile ways of working. Daily standups, close collaboration, and a strong sense of ownership are key parts of the team culture.
   

  

**Why join this role**
 This is a role for someone who wants to work broadly as a fullstack developer and take real ownership of complete solutions. You will be part of a long-term journey, continuously developing new functionality and delivering value at scale in a high-impact B2C context.
   

  

**About Us**
 GlobalConnect is one of the leading connectivity providers in Northern Europe. We’re 2000 passionate and talented individuals who want to make a difference, turning our customers’ visions into reality through connectivity. Our goal is to create the best possible conditions for engaged employees, a place where you can develop and grow, and create unforgettable memories and enjoyable experiences.
   

  

 We have helped develop and digitize societies across the Nordics for more than two decades. Our purpose is what drives us to continue - turning visions into reality by empowering society with connectivity.

title: Junior Software Engineer
description:
**Junior Software Engineer - Qualia** 




 We're building the development platform for robotic foundation models. The research in embodied AI is moving fast—the tooling isn't. We're fixing that.
 



 We need another engineer who can ship fast, cares about craft, and wants equity in a company at the intersection of foundation models and robotics.
 



  





**What Qualia does** 




 Qualia lets robotics teams tune foundation models for robots, train reward models, generate synthetic data, and deploy, all through one platform. No PhD required.
 



  





 We're backed by Heartcore, Wave Ventures, Florent Capital, and CX2, with partnerships across NVIDIA, Google, and more. €2M+ pre-seed raised.
 



  





**What you'd work on** 




 Everything. SDK and inference, training pipelines, billing infrastructure, sim tooling, frontend, compute integrations. This is a small team - there are no narrow lanes.
 



  





**Stack:** 
 Python, Rust, Terraform, PyTorch, JAX, Svelte, Postgres
 



  





**What we're looking for** 




 Strong engineer, backend-leaning or full-stack. You've shipped real products. Comfortable with ambiguity. Python proficiency required (Rust is a plus). Based anywhere in Europe or willing to relocate. You want to work hard.
 



  





**What you get** 




 Meaningful equity, founding-era impact, and a team from top institutions. Embodied AI is where software meets the physical world—this is the decade it becomes real.

title: Frontend Developer
description:
****Why choose Coody****
 At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:
   

  

**Maximized Compensation.** 
 Typically a +40% salary increase.
   

  

**Freedom & Flexibility** 
 . No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.
   

  

**Employment Security.** 
 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.
   

  

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*
****What you’ll be doing****
 As a
 **Senior Front-end Developer** 
 at Coody, you’ll help build and scale new and existing products with real end-to-end ownership of the service, the code, and the outcomes. Assignments are typically 6-24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. While your home base is frontend using JavaScript and TypeScript, you’ll sometimes work across the full tech stack (e.g., integrations, cloud infrastructure, CI/CD) to ship complete solutions. You’ll design and build scalable, robust frontend applications, contribute to architecture and testing/automation, and play an active role in a teams of different sizes.
   

  

**Who you are** 
 We are seeking a
 **Frontend Engineer with at least 8+ years of experience** 
 . You must have a proven ability to get things done. Here’s what we’re seeking:
   

  

* At least 8+ years of experience using TypeScript and Javascript.
* Solid skills in modern libraries and frameworks such as Next.js, React, Vue.js, Svelte, Node, NestJS, Angular, Express.js, Solid, React Native.
* A degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related field.
* Based in Sweden: You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency.
* Fluent in English (spoken and written).
* Ability to start immidiately.


****This is Coody****
 We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting, combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.
   

  

 At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition, which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.
   

  

 Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.
   

  

 We’re a
 **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals** 
 , representing more than
 **14 nationalities** 
 .
   

  

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy** 
 . Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice,
 **explore our Employee Handbook** 
 and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.
   

  

**How to apply** 
 Are you excited to take your career to the next level and meet the criterias? Apply now, and we'll be in touch shortly.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Meet the Team**
 Join Cisco's Webex Media engineering site in Stockholm, where we craft the meeting experience that connects people and businesses around the world. We are a highly motivated, startup‑like team within a global organization, combining the impact and resources of Cisco with the agility and camaraderie of a smaller group. Our work powers the shift to a hybrid workforce and aims to make people feel truly connected. You’ll find a friendly, supportive environment that celebrates creativity, growth, and a shared passion for building world‑class real‑time media experiences.
   

  

**Your Impact**
* Bring new real‑time media features to life based on product requirements.
* Perform peer code reviews and automate development workflows and quality gates.
* Participate in agile ceremonies including daily stand‑ups, planning, releases, and retrospectives.
* Collaborate across teams to broaden technical and soft skills through training and mentoring.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Hold a bachelor's degree (or equivalent) in Software Engineering or a related field.
* Proficient in C and C++ programming languages.
* Possess strong knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and design patterns.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with media streaming and relevant protocols for real‑time applications.
* Experience designing cross‑platform solutions using appropriate patterns and build tools.
* Experience with close‑to‑real‑time systems and performance‑sensitive code paths.


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: Full Stack Developer (Medior)
description:
****About Justera Group****
 Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.
   

  

****About the Role:****
 We are looking for a dedicated
 **Medior Full Stack Developer** 
 to join our client's agile DevSecOps team. In this role, you will contribute to a collaborative environment that values technical excellence, continuous learning, and a proactive approach to digital security.
   

  

 As a Full Stack Developer, you will work on end-to-end solutions, bridging the gap between sophisticated backend logic and user-centric frontend interfaces.
   

  

****Your Responsibilities:****
* Develop and maintain web-based applications with a focus on end-to-end functionality.
* Collaborate closely with UX/UI designers to ensure high accessibility and usability.
* Operate within an agile framework using Test-Driven Development (TDD).
* Ensure high code quality through unit testing and automated test suites.
* Implement Secure Software Development practices in compliance with IT and information security legal frameworks.
* Document technical solutions and processes to support long-term maintainability.


****Requirements:****
 We are seeking a problem-solver who thrives in a team setting and is passionate about modern web technologies.
   

  

* Experience: 4–5 years of professional web development (Medior level).
* Language: Fluent in Swedish (written and verbal) is mandatory.
* Education: Relevant post-secondary education in IT or Computer Science.
* Location: Must be able to work from the Solna (Stockholm) office at least 2 days per week.


**Technical Stack:**
* C#, .NET, JavaScript, and TypeScript.
* Angular (Version 17+).
* CSS frameworks (Tailwind or Bootstrap).
* Azure DevOps and cloud solutions.
* REST, JSON, XML, OAuth, and Open Identity.
* Experience with CMS platforms (ideally Optimizely/Episerver).


**Bonus Points for:**
* Docker, SQL, and databases.
* Redis or other caching solutions.
* Web analytics tools (e.g., Piwik PRO or Google Analytics).


**Assignment Details**
* Duration: April to December 2026 (with possibility of extension)
* Location: Solna (Stockholm)
* Workload: 40 hours/week (Hybrid: 2 days/week in-office required).


****What We Offer:****
* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
**About Kambi**
*Kambi Group plc is a leading B2B provider of premium sports betting services to licensed gaming operators. Our services provide an end-to-end solution for operators wanting to launch a standalone Sportsbook or bolster their existing offering with an innovative sports betting product. From front-end user interface to customer intelligence, risk management and odds compiling, all built on our in-house developed software, we strive to deliver the ultimate service and solution to our partners.*
*Our vision is to create the world’s leading sports betting experiences, together with our partners.*
**About Tzeract**
 Tzeract is changing the way we bet on sports. As Kambi’s in-house startup, we've built a completely new platform from the ground up - with our own AI at the core, not just as an add-on. Today we already handle over 500 millions bets in distributed systems with a low latency, and your work will be scaled globally from day one.
   

  

 We iterate quickly, decide fast, and your calendar stays free for the work that matters. This gives you time for coffee breaks, test ideas and solve problems together. In this role, you’ll help shape both the product and parts of the architecture. It’s the combination of startup freedom with an enterprise touch - and your contributions will be visible and felt by millions of users worldwide.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We’re looking for
 **a Fullstack Developer with a strong front-end focus** 
 to help us continue to build and innovate our market-leading sports trading tool.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of product, trading expertise, and platform engineering. You’ll work closely with our Product Owner, sports trading experts, and platform team to design and deliver intuitive, high-performance user interfaces for complex, real-time trading workflows.
   

  

 Your primary focus will be front-end development using
 **React** 
 , supported by
 **Node.js** 
 and
 **Python** 
 services. You’ll also collaborate closely with teams building backend services written in
 **Python and Rust** 
 , all deployed on
 **AWS** 
 with a strong preference for serverless architectures.
   

  

 If you enjoy turning complex, data-heavy systems into elegant user experiences — and thrive in a collaborative, fast-moving startup environment — this role is for you.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Design, develop, and maintain modern front-end applications using React and MUI X, with a strong focus on usability, performance, and reliability.
* Build and maintain front-end–facing services using Node.js and Python.
* Collaborate closely with Product Owners and sports trading experts to translate complex domain requirements into intuitive user experiences.
* Work alongside backend engineers developing services in Python and Rust to integrate real-time data and trading logic.
* Contribute to cloud-native solutions on AWS, with a preference for serverless designs.
* Participate in architectural discussions across the full stack and help shape front-end standards and best practices.
* Improve developer experience through testing, CI/CD, and shared tooling.
* Continuously evolve the sports trading platform as product and business needs grow.


**What We Believe You Have**
* Strong experience building front-end applications with React (experience with MUI / MUI X or similar libraries is a big plus).
* Solid understanding of fullstack development, including APIs and service integration.
* Experience with Node.js and Python in a production environment.
* Exposure to or interest in backend systems written in Python and/or Rust.
* Experience working with AWS and cloud-native architectures (serverless experience is a plus).
* Familiarity with modern software engineering practices such as automated testing, CI/CD, and version control.
* A collaborative mindset and comfort working closely with product managers and domain experts.
* Enjoyment of a fast-paced startup environment where priorities evolve.


 #wearekambi
   

  

***Kambi's ongoing commitment to Diversity and Inclusion in the workplace***
*If you require any reasonable adjustment during the recruitment process, please notify your recruiter, who will assist you however they can. Diversity and inclusion is at the heart of who we are and who we aim to be. While we are proud of the positive and inclusive company culture we have created, we know we can do so much more. Kambi constantly evolves its Diversity and Inclusion strategy to ensure it becomes an even more inclusive and positive place to work, with the core management team reaffirming its commitment to delivering on employee feedback.*
***Creating an inclusive environment***
*We believe Kambi's greatest strength is the collective talent of our employees. Kambi is committed to ensuring we create an inclusive work environment where everyone can feel valued, thrive and achieve their potential, regardless of who they are or what their background is. We know that it is only by having a balance of different voices, values and opinions that Kambi is able to be the market leader it is today.*
*#wearekambi*

title: Software Developer
description:
**Are you a passionate Software Developer looking for your next big challenge?** 
 Do you enjoy solving complex problems, building scalable applications, and working with a team that values innovation and collaboration?
   

  

 My name is Nina Fogelberg and I work as Head of B2B Products & Platforms at Telia Finance. I’m now looking to expand the team with a Software Developer to our Final team in Telia Finance AB. The new Transformation team is established to work with our new Final Java platform that will be in production in early 2026. Are you the one we’re looking for?
   

  

**Is this you next opportunity?**
 Final is our Telia Finance core platform supporting our B2B business products Leasing and Billing. As a Software Developer you will be responsible for develop/re-write integrations, develop functions according to our new design philosophy and be part of the modernization of the migrated platform. Our new design will replace functions that are not part of the one-to-one migration of the platform. We are in the transformation journey of migrating the current Cobol based platform to Java, in this work we also need to transform integrations and file flows so that these can communicate with the new Java based platform.
   

  

 Key responsibilities:
   

  

* Manage coding and code reviews to maintain high code quality standards
* Database integration, particularly with Oracle RDBMS
* Work in Kubernetes-based Linux environments, including Bash scriptning
* Perform tests and documentation
* Frontend development using React or Vue, JavaScript, TypeScript, and CSS


**Is this you?**
 To be successful in this role we believe you have at least 7 years of backend development experience in Java, and are comfortable with management tools like Maven, as well as Kubernetes-based Linux environments. You have previously been working with modern version control and CI/CD tools such as GitHub, GitHub Runners, and JFrog Artifactory. A solid understanding of test-driven development (TDD) is essential. Fluency in English is required, fluency in Swedish is preferred.
   

  

**Key experience:**
* Hands-on coding and code reviews to maintain high code quality standards
* Experience with build and dependency management tools, such as Maven
* Working in Kubernetes-based Linux environments, including Bash scripting
* Version control and CI/CD tools, including GitHub, GitHub Runners, and JFrog Artifactory
* Familiarity with test-driven development (TDD)
* Fluency in English, fluency in Swedish is preferred.
* Experience with advanced invoicing solutions, accounts receivable systems, or accounting functionality within a business system context is considered a plus


**It’s more than just a job**
 At Telia Finance, we will give you the tools and support you need to grow both professionally and personally. We can offer you your next big opportunity in a creative, motivating, and welcoming company where everyone can be themselves, with equal access to opportunities. In addition to an attractive and inclusive work environment, we also enable flexibility and offer a wide variety of employee benefits. We offer flexible working conditions that support collaboration and growth, with most of your time spent at our modern office to foster teamwork and innovation.
   

  

 Here at Telia Finance we deeply value personal development; for example, we offer internal training to all employees as a way of helping our employees in their personal and professional growth. We welcome applicants with different backgrounds and nationalities, but we do require you to have the relevant work permits for Sweden. We offer you a flexible working environments,
   

  

**Interested?**
 If this sounds like the right opportunity for you, we would love to hear from you! For more information, feel free to contact Talent Partner Christine Wilén, at christine.wilen@teliacompany.com. Location for this position is Solna, Stockholm.
   

  

 To ensure your personal data is handled securely, please apply through our recruitment system. We are unable to accept applications via email. The selection process is ongoing, and the position may be filled before the deadline. During the process, required background controls will be performed.
   

  

**Welcome to Telia Finance – Home to you next big opportunity!**

title: Senior .NET Developer
description:
**Senior Full‑Stack Developer (.NET) - Fintech - Stockholm (Hybrid)** 




  





 A growing Nordic fintech company is looking for a Senior Full‑Stack Developer to join their product and engineering organisation in Stockholm.
 



  





 This is an opportunity to work with a well‑established financial brand that is heavily investing in modernising its digital platforms and building new, cloud‑native services that power secure, high‑performance customer experiences across web and mobile.
 



  





 You’ll join a small, cross‑functional team with full ownership of its products — working end‑to‑end across architecture, backend development, frontend development, CI/CD, and Azure cloud scaling.
 



  





 You’ll have the autonomy to influence technical decisions, introduce new ideas, and shape the next generation of digital financial services.
 



  





**Tech stack** 



* .NET Core, C#, Azure
* React (or similar modern frameworks)
* CI/CD, cloud architecture, API development



  





**Requirements** 



* 5+ years’ experience in .NET / C#, Azure, SQL, and React/TypeScript
* Strong understanding of system architecture, microservices, and event‑driven patterns
* Experience working with CI/CD pipelines, IaC, and cloud engineering in Azure
* Experience building secure, resilient systems for high‑trust environments (fintech or similar is a plus)
* Fluent in Swedish



  





**What’s on offer** 



* Hybrid work setup in central Stockholm
* Opportunity to work on large‑scale, customer‑facing financial products with modern tech
* A flat, collaborative engineering culture where your input directly shapes the product
* A stable, long‑term environment combined with strong investment in innovation and cloud‑native development



  





***Please apply using the Easy Apply function.***




  





***Application deadline is 12/04/2026, but applications will be processed on an ongoing basis so please apply ASAP if you are interested.***




  





***Any questions, please email t.collard-gentle@tenthrevolution.com***

title: Software Engineer Avanza
description:
**Är du en backend-utvecklare som vill vara med och skapa framtidens digitala bankupplevelse tillsammans med andra som brinner för teknik och samhällsnytta?**
 Avanza söker nu en engagerad utvecklare som vill vara med och forma nästa generations digitala tjänster för sparande, investeringar och bank. Hos oss kombineras teknikintresse med samhällsengagemang, i team där gemenskap, samarbete och inkludering är en självklar del av vardagen. Vi tror på ett arbetsliv där det går att vara både ambitiös och mänsklig, där balans och meningsfullhet är lika viktiga som innovation.
   

  

 Om rollen
   

  

 Som Software Engineer hos oss på Avanza blir du en nyckelspelare i en av Sveriges mest spännande teknikresor. Vi har påbörjat en omfattande molntransformering mot Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Vårt mål är tydligt: Till 2030 ska vi huvudsakligen vara helt molnbaserade och under 2026 växlar vi upp tempot rejält med målsättningen att migrera över 100 tjänster.
   

  

 Du kommer att tillhöra ett av våra 45 autonoma team där du jobbar nära din Product Manager och dina designers. Våra team arbetar med Order Management System, strömmad data, höga transaktionsvolymer, datadriven utveckling och Machine Learning. Beroende på vilket team du landar i kommer din vardag handla om allt från att vidareutveckla vår högpresterande on-prem-miljö till att bryta ny mark i molnet. Du får vara med och sätta standarden för hur vi modellerar data och bygger skalbara tjänster i en modern molnmiljö.
   

  

 Din tekniska vardag
   

  

 Vi Rör Oss Från En Arkitektur Byggd På Gigaspaces Och Interna Plattformar Mot En Modern, Molnbaserad Stack. Där Kommer Du Att Arbeta Med
   

  

* Java som huvudspråk för våra mikrotjänster
* GCP som vår framtida hemvist, där vi bygger för hög tillgänglighet och skalbarhet
* Modern datamodellering i molnet, med Google Spanner för applikationsdata och BigQuery för data warehousing
* Kommunikation via gRPC och händelsestyrda flöden med Kafka


 Vem är du?
   

  

 Vi söker dig som älskar problemlösning och som vill bygga system som gör skillnad för över två miljoner kunder. I rollen som utvecklare gillar du att dela med dig av dina kunskaper och du lockas av utmaningen i att migrera komplexa system till molnet.
   

  

 Som person ser vi att du är en nyfiken och kommunikativ lagspelare som trivs bäst när du får lösa komplexa problem tillsammans med andra. Du tar stort ansvar för den tekniska kvaliteten och drivs av att skriva välstrukturerad, testbar och skalbar kod, samtidigt som du också har ett naturligt helhetstänk, där du vill bidra till både teamets arbetssätt och produktens utveckling.
   

  

 På Avanza får du en kultur som präglas av prestigelöshet, en miljö där det är självklart att fråga samt dela med sig av kunskap och där vi ser varje utmaning eller misslyckande som en möjlighet att lära oss och växa tillsammans.
   

  

 Vi tror att du har
   

  

* Minst 4 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet
* Gedigen erfarenhet av att bygga och underhålla distribuerade system och API:er i Java
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla och driftsätta tjänster i molnmiljö (Cloud Native)


 Det är meriterande om du har
   

  

* Erfarenhet av Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* Erfarenhet av molnbaserade databaser såsom Google Spanner och/eller analytiska plattformar som BigQuery, gärna med dbt för datatransformering
* Erfarenhet av vår nuvarande stack (t.ex. Gigaspaces eller liknande in-memory-lösningar) för att hjälpa oss i bryggan mellan on-prem och moln
* Vana av att jobba med händelsestyrd arkitektur (Kafka)


 En kultur för gemenskap och hållbarhet
   

  

 Vi tror att de bästa resultaten uppstår i trygga team där alla får komma till tals. Därför lägger vi stor vikt vid samarbete, öppenhet och arbetsglädje. Vi strävar efter jämställda team där alla känner sig trygga att vara sig själva och bidra med sin unika kompetens. Hos oss får du utrymme att utvecklas i din egen takt och kombinera arbetet med ett hållbart liv.
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Skicka din ansökan genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök” nedan. Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

*Erbjudanden från rekryteringsföretag/annonssäljare undanbedes.*
 Avanza är Sveriges ledande plattform för sparande och placeringar. Vi drivs av att förändra branschen genom att utmana de stora bankerna och försäkringsbolagen på den svenska sparmarknaden. Vi vill vara tjänsten som förenklar och förbättrar spararnas ekonomi, oavsett om man älskar aktier eller bara vill ha ett bra sparande. Vår vision är att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor. Därför står våra kunders bästa alltid i fokus, precis som det borde vara. Affärsidén är enkel – mer till dig, mindre till banken. En idé som gett oss Sveriges nöjdaste sparare 15 år i rad.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Senior .NET Opportunity in Stockholm** 




  





 I am looking for
 *Swedish speaking* 
 Senior .NET Developers in Stockholm to join a company working in the e-commerce space. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in building and maintaining .NET applications, alongside strong experience working with Azure DevOps and Architecture. Bonus points if you've worked with IaC or Microservices.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  




* Develop, maintain, and optimize backend services and APIs using .NET/C# and Azure technologies.
* Design and implement scalable microservices-based solutions in Azure, supporting the transition from a monolithic architecture.
* Apply modern DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, and automated testing.
* Integrate and manage real-time data flows.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams, provide input into technical decisions and architectural discussions



  





**Requirements:** 




  




* 5+ years' experience working with .NET/C#
* Strong experience working with Azure DevOps and CI/CD
* Experience working with Microservice architecture
* Bonus: Experience working with IaC such as Terraform or Bicep.



  





*This role requires candidates to speak fluent Swedish and cannot assist with visa sponsorships.* 




  





**Why join?** 




  




* Work with modern Azure and .NET technologies in a cloud first environment.
* Opportunity to shape architecture and technical decisions in a stable environment with experienced colleague's.
* High technical ownership in which you can decide when to deploy and manage your infrastructure.
* Learning oriented culture with AI opportunities, cross collaboration, and excellent team culture.



  





**Please apply via the Easy Apply function.** 




  





**For more information, please email l.letchford@tenthrevolution.com.** 




  





**The application deadline for this position is the 28th of November, 2025, however applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis so please apply quickly.**

title: Software Engineer- Fullstack
description:
**Vill du bygga lösningar som gör skillnad för miljontals sparare och skapa framtidens bankupplevelse? Nu söker vi dig som älskar kombinationen av modern Java och Angular, och som vill arbeta på en arbetsplats som värdesätter teknisk innovation och samarbete högt.**
**Varför Avanza?**
 Hos oss är teknik inte bara kod – det är ett verktyg för att skapa samhällsnytta. Du blir en del av en inkluderande miljö där vi tror på att man presterar som bäst när man mår bra. Här kombinerar vi en hög teknisk ambition med att ha kul på jobbet. Vi jobbar i autonoma team, delar kunskap prestigelöst och firar framgångar tillsammans.
   

  

 Var med på en spännande resa! Vi har påbörjat en omfattande molntransformering mot Google Cloud Platform (GCP), till 2030 ska vi huvudsakligen vara helt molnbaserade och vi har en ambition att Avanza ska vara "AI-first".
   

  

**Din roll hos oss**
 Som Fullstackutvecklare kliver du in i ett av våra ca 45 agila team. Du får ett helhetsansvar – från den första idéskissen till att koden snurrar stabilt i produktion. Beroende på vilket team du hamnar i kan din roll se olika ut, du kan ha lika stor tyngd på backend som frontend eller ha störst tyngd på frontend alternativt backend.
   

  

**I Vardagen Innebär Det Att Du**
* Designar och utvecklar skalbara webbapplikationer i en modern mikrotjänstarkitektur.
* Tar ägarskap för hela stacken: från responsiva gränssnitt i Angular till robust logik i Java.
* Drivs av samarbete: Vi tror starkt på par- och mobbprogrammering för att sprida kunskap och höja kvaliteten.
* Formar tekniken: Du deltar aktivt i designprocesser och arkitektoniska beslut.
* Optimerar flöden: I nära samarbete med Product Managers och UX-designers skapar du smidiga användarresor.


**Vem är du?**
 Vi tror att du är en lagspelare som trivs när du får kombinera tekniskt djup med ett helhetstänk kring produkten. Du är nyfiken, kommunikativ och ser värdet i en kultur där det är lika självklart att be om hjälp som att erbjuda den.
   

  

**Vi Söker Dig Som Har**
* Några års erfarenhet som Fullstackutvecklare med fokus på Java och moderna frontend-ramverk (främst Angular, men React är också meriterande).
* Goda kunskaper i HTML, CSS och JavaScript/TypeScript.
* Vana av att bygga och underhålla applikationer i komplexa produktionsmiljöer.
* Ett öga för ren, testbar och välstrukturerad kod.
* Erfarenhet av (eller ett stort intresse för) agila arbetssätt och kontinuerliga förbättringar.


 Det är ett plus om du har arbetat inom Fintech tidigare eller har ett extra intresse för UX och designsystem.
   

  

**Hur vi jobbar**
 Vi jobbar datadrivet och iterativt för att snabbt kunna leverera värde till våra användare. För oss är hållbar utvecklingstakt inte bara ett modeord – det är fundamentet i vår kultur.
   

  

**Redo att bli en av oss?**
 Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande och ser fram emot att höra mer om dig och din resa!
   

  

**Ansökan** 
 : Klicka på "Ansök"-knappen och bifoga ditt CV eller din LinkedIn-profil.
   

  

*Erbjudanden från rekryteringsföretag och annonssäljare undanbedes vänligen men bestämt.*
 Avanza är Sveriges ledande plattform för sparande och placeringar. Vi drivs av att förändra branschen genom att utmana de stora bankerna och försäkringsbolagen på den svenska sparmarknaden. Vi vill vara tjänsten som förenklar och förbättrar spararnas ekonomi, oavsett om man älskar aktier eller bara vill ha ett bra sparande. Vår vision är att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor. Därför står våra kunders bästa alltid i fokus, precis som det borde vara. Affärsidén är enkel – mer till dig, mindre till banken. En idé som gett oss Sveriges nöjdaste sparare 15 år i rad.

title: Node Developer
description:
At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.
   

  

 Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.
   

  

 Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.
   

  

*Are you a seasoned Node developer who values stability over startup chaos? Join our Broadband Provisioning team at Tele2, where we keep Sweden connected — not through cables and routers, but by making sure every thousands broadband order flows smoothly from start to finish. You’ll work in a pragmatic environment that values reliability, simplicity, and long-term impact over buzzwords and hype.*
**About The Job**
 As a senior Node developer, you will be part of a team that develops and maintains the solutions around our broadband business. You will contribute to constantly improving our code base working with modern technologies like Node/Typescript and Kubernetes.
   

  

 The team has responsibility for a variety of systems reaching from the network side to the frontend. The role requires that you can take on different tasks dependent on the current priorities.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 You are a pragmatic developer who enjoys taking ownership of features from concept to deployment. With a solid foundation in the modern web stack, you thrive in a collaborative environment and are driven to ship clean, scalable, and reliable code.
   

  

**To be successful in this role, we think that you:**
* Have solid experience in Node.js/Typescript
* Have good knowledge about databases, e.g. MySQL
* Are comfortable deploying in Docker/Kubernetes
* Are familiar with frontend technologies like Angular (and Vue and React)
* Are comfortable using Linux


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with messaging/streaming technologies like Kafka
* Experience with tools like Redis or Elastic Search


**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: Fullstack Engineer - Frontend Focus
description:
**Join our highly skilled team of developers - breaking new ground and shaping the future of retail.** 




  





**We dare to dream big, we have the courage to keep raising the bar, and we’re committed to being a force for good in retail - helping both established and fast-growing brands meet the ever-changing expectations of their customers.** 




  





**Sitoo is a fast-growing technology company exploring how far we can take innovation to deliver the world’s best Unified Commerce Platform and Point of Sale. Our technology is used in more than 20 countries - a number that keeps growing thanks to our incredible team of engineers. And we have no intention of slowing down. Are you the Software Engineer we’re looking for?** 




  





**Your Mission at Sitoo** 




  





 As a Fullstack Engineer at Sitoo, you'll play a vital role in building our next-generation web products. You'll join a small, agile team focused on developing the world's best Point of Sales and Unified Commerce Platform. Your work will span front and backend applications built with React, TypeScript, and Node.js. In our small team environment, your impact and influence will be significant.
 



  





**What you'll do** 




  




* Own, develop and operate Sitoo’s web products
* Collaborate with the team to innovate and improve processes and tooling
* Build a scalable infrastructure in AWS
* Write tests to ensure product quality
* Manage CI/CD pipelines on GitHub
* Participate in development guilds



  





**What you'll bring to the table** 




  




* 5+ years of experience as a professional fullstack developer building and maintaining web applications
* Experience writing Node.js services and frontend apps with TypeScript
* A background working in fast-growing or scaling environments
* Experience in cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* Fluency in English, both written and spoken



  





**Bonus** 




  




* Azure DevOps, Github Actions or GitLab CI/CD
* IaC with CDK or similar
* E2E tests with Playwright
* AI-assisted integrated development environment or agentic coding tools like Claude Code, GitHub Copilot or Cursor
* Working with design systems / documentation in Storybook



  





**Why Sitoo** 




  





 We are forward thinkers. By turning curiosity into knowledge — and knowledge into continuous improvement — we break new ground and shape the future of retail.
 



  





 We believe in an inclusive culture where everyone feels like they belong. We support each other, win together, celebrate success together, and overcome challenges together.
 



  





 Today, we are close to 100 dedicated experts with a positive and solution-oriented mindset. Most importantly, we take care of each other, and we never forget to have fun.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer - VC backed Scale Up
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Full Stack Engineer to take ownership of core product areas and play a key role in shaping the technical direction of a modern, cloud‑native platform. This role offers a high level of autonomy, responsibility, and the opportunity to influence both architecture and long‑term product strategy. The position is hybrid, and you must be comfortable commuting into the Stockholm office 2 to 3 days per week.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 




 • Lead the end‑to‑end development of new product features across both frontend and backend
 



 • Contribute to architectural decisions, technical standards, and best practices
 



 • Build scalable, reliable, well‑tested services
 



 • Work closely with product, design, and engineering leadership
 



 • Drive performance improvements, system reliability, and technical quality
 



 • Support both greenfield projects and broader platform enhancements
 



 • Help evolve a cloud‑native, microservice‑driven environment
 



  





**What You Bring** 




 • 6+ years working across modern JavaScript and TypeScript environments
 



 • Strong hands‑on experience with React on the frontend
 



 • Extensive backend experience with Node.js (Express, NestJS or similar)
 



 • Good understanding of AWS or similar cloud platforms
 



 • Experience with CI/CD, Docker, and modern DevOps workflows
 



 • Ability to take ownership, work independently, and deliver high‑quality solutions
 



 • A product‑focused mindset with an interest in improving user experience
 



 • Comfortable commuting to the Stockholm office 2 to 3 days per week
 



 • Strong engineers outside the 6+ year range are encouraged to apply
 



  





**Nice to Have** 




 • Experience with microservices or distributed systems
 



 • Knowledge of PostgreSQL or other relational databases
 



 • Familiarity with system performance, observability, or event‑driven architecture
 



  





 Please feel free to apply directly and/or reach out to me on the below:
 



 ✉ Email: w.stanton@tenthrevolution.com
 



 ☎ Contact number: +46 77 588 86 06

title: Senior developer Dynamics 365 CE Stockholm
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
 Med över 50 000 experter globalt och som certifierad och managerad Microsoft Cloud Partner på högsta nivån, har vi kompetensen och specialiseringar att leverera hållbara, smarta lösningar som gör verklig skillnad. På Sopra Steria förenar vi teknik och syfte för att driva digital transformation med Azure OpenAI, Copilot, BI, Dynamics 365 och Power Platform. Tillsammans med våra kunder förenklar vi processer, stärker kundrelationer och skapar värde för både verksamhet och samhälle. Genom att tillämpa AI där det ger störst effekt hjälper vi organisationer att ta nästa steg i sin digitala resa.
   

  

 Hos oss på Sopra Steria arbetar du med alla delar av utvecklingsprocessen, från koncept till implementation och förvaltning. Du får bryta ner komplexa problem och skapa anpassade lösningar till kunder med den allra senaste tekniken, med grund i Microsofts hela portfölj av tjänster. Som utvecklare rör vi oss över hela stacken, vilket gör att arbetsuppgifterna under en vecka kan variera. Att arbeta med Microsofts paraply av molntjänster, som dessutom ständigt utökas, gör att du kan bli specialist inom ditt kompetensområde, men ändå alltid ha mer att lära.
   

  

 Vi söker en person som vill vara med och driva den egna och andras utveckling, som vill agera mentor åt juniora, men också leda utvecklingsteam och vara ytterst ansvarig för den tekniska implementationen. Som utvecklare samarbetar man nära med den tekniska arkitekten för att säkerställa leveransens kvalitet.
   

  

 Arbetsuppgifterna som utvecklare hos oss kan t.ex. innebära att:
   

  

* Anpassa funktionaliteten i Dynamics CE genom utveckling av tillägg i C# och klientanpassningar i JavaScript/TypeScript
* Skapa .NET Core-applikationer för att integrera till och från Dynamics CE
* Skapa low code-lösningar baserat på Power Apps och Power Automate
* Skapa förutsägbara och stabila releaser med verktyg som Azure DevOps, TeamCity, Octopus Deploy m.fl.


**Om dig**
 Vi söker dig som har tidigare erfarenhet av .NET-utveckling inom Dynamics CE:
   

  

* 3 års erfarenhet som utvecklare backend, C# .NET
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse, Azure eller andra kringliggande tjänster inom området
* God kommunikativ förmåga i svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift


 Det är även meriterande att ha erfarenhet och/eller intresse av Copilot studio och generativ AI.
   

  

**Varför välja Sopra Steria**
 Hos oss får du ett stabilt bolag med stora kunder och resurser, i kombination med entreprenörsanda och stark teamkänsla. Vi erbjuder utmanande uppdrag där du kan bidra tekniskt för att göra skillnad i samhället. Med kollektivavtal, marknadsmässiga löner, flexibilitet och en kultur präglad av kunskapsdelning och samarbete vill vi ge dig riktigt bra förutsättningar för att lyckas. Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss här.
   

  

**Ansök nu – vi ser fram emot att träffa dig!**
 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.
   

  

 Rekryteringsprocessen består av tre intervjuer, personlighet- och logiktest, referenstagning och bakgrundskontroll. Denna kombination av urvalsmetoder ger oss en bredare och mer rättvis bild av dig som kandidat, samtidigt som det säkerställer att både dina tekniska och personliga styrkor kommer till sin rätt. För dig som kandidat innebär det en möjlighet att visa din kompetens och potential från flera perspektiv.
   

  

 Om du har frågor om tjänsten eller oss som bolag är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryterare, Theresia, på theresia.wiclander@soprasteria.com

title: Lead Software Engineer role for an industry disruptor!
description:
Lead software engineer role - Stockholm! 👋✅
 



  





 I'm working with a small, but super well-established, product-led organisation that is genuinely disrupting and transforming a traditionally corporate, enterprise industry, with digital-first, customer-centric web & native apps!
 



  





 With a focus on remaining at the cutting-edge of technology, and in 2026, building and deploying AI-powered, production grade features as they continue to grow, they are looking for a
 **lead engineer** 
 to join their ambitious but flat, agile engineering & product organisation, in
 **a role that combines technical strategy & decision making, hands-on executing and mentoring, coaching and empowering a super talented team!** 




  





**This is a permanent role, hybrid out of the Stockholm HQ!** 




  





**Role & extra context** 
 ✅💻
 



  





 You'd be a key part of their tech & product team (approx. 20 people), a flat and agile environment where ownership and autonomy is encouraged, but collaboration is key. That is made up of talented engineers working across web, mobile and back-office systems, and you'll work closely with the other tech leads, VP & CTO!
 



  





**You will:** 




  




* Lead, coach, and grow a high-performing engineering team
* Set technical direction and uphold engineering best practices
* Support structured development and career growth
* Contribute to production code when it adds value or unblocks the team
* Collaborate closely with product and business partners
* Uphold and foster a culture of trust and collaboration



  





**☁️💡Tech stack:** 
**AWS, Kotlin, Spring, Microservice architecture, Next,js, GraphQL & Native apps! -** 
 although you may come from a background in different programming languages/frame
 **works, and as an individual contributor, you will be focused on your area of expertise.** 




  





**What you are:** 




  




* A senior software engineer with approx 5+ years of professional experience, and a further 2+ within a leadership capacity (tech lead, team lead, engineering manager, mentor etc)
* Hands-on, happy to jump on and deliver production-grade code when needed
* Comfortable balancing strategic leadership, team empowerment & leadership and hands-on technical work
* Strong experience across the full software development lifecycle and agile methodology
* A clear communicator, able to collaborate with others, mentor & coach engineers, work with different stakeholders, give and receive constructive criticism etc
* Comfortable in our stack with strong computer science fundamentals



  





 A fantastic opportunity for the right person - reach out now if this is of interest!

title: Developer - Javaramverk
description:
*Vi tror på ett samhälle format av framgångsrika företag där entreprenörskap och samhällsnytta går hand i hand. Att vara en del av Fortnox är att vara en del av en ständig förändring - en förändring där du själv bestämmer hur långt du vill nå. Vårt största fokus är att ge dig rätt förutsättningar att få leva din passion tillsammans med oss. Var du kommer ifrån är inte relevant - det är vart du är på väg som är intressant för oss. Precis som vi igår inte kunde drömma om det Fortnox som finns idag, så kan du vara med och forma vilka vi är imorgon.*
**Om tjänsten**
 På Fortnox bygger vi inte bara produkter - vi bygger plattformar som hundratals utvecklare förlitar sig på varje dag. En av våra absolut viktigaste är vår Java-plattform. Nu söker vi en
 **senior Javautvecklare** 
 som vill ta ett tydligt tekniskt ägarskap och driva vårt javaramverk in i nästa generation.
   

  

 Det här är en roll för dig som vill påverka på riktigt: arkitektur, ramverk, tekniska vägval och hur Java används i stor skala hos ett av Sveriges ledande produktbolag.
   

  

 Vårt nuvarande javaramverk är byggt på
 **reaktiv Java** 
 och används brett i organisationen. Framåt är riktningen tydlig:
 **Spring Boot** 
 blir grunden för nästa generation av Javautveckling på Fortnox. Det innebär ett långsiktigt arbete som spänner över:
   

  

* Förvaltning och vidareutveckling av befintligt reaktivt ramverk
* Design och uppbyggnad av ett modernt Spring Boot-baserat ramverk
* Strategi, verktyg och stöd för migrering från gammalt till nytt
* Att sätta standarder, best practices och tekniska riktlinjer för Java på Fortnox


 Som senior Javautvecklare i plattformsteamet blir du en teknisk ledare med stort inflytande. Du jobbar nära andra seniora utvecklare, arkitekter och produktteam för att säkerställa att Javaplattformen är stabil idag och relevant imorgon.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
* Ta tekniskt ägarskap för Fortnox javaramverk
* Vidareutveckla och underhålla befintlig reaktiv Java-stack
* Designa och bygga nästa generations Java-plattform baserad på Spring Boot
* Driva och möjliggöra migrering från reaktivt ramverk till Spring Boot
* Definiera arkitekturprinciper, kodstandarder och golden paths för Java
* Bygga och förvalta gemensamma bibliotek, starters och ramverkskomponenter
* Arbeta nära utvecklingsteam för att förstå deras behov och sänka trösklar
* Fungera som teknisk mentor och bollplank för andra utvecklare
* Bidra till långsiktiga tekniska vägval och plattformsstrategi


**Om dig**
 Det här är en roll för dig som är
 **mycket erfaren** 
 och trygg i din tekniska kompetens. Du har varit med förr - både när ramverk byggts upp och när de behövde moderniseras. Du trivs i gränslandet mellan strategi och kod, och du är bekväm med att ta beslut som påverkar många team.
   

  

 Vi tror att du känner igen dig i:
   

  

* Mycket gedigen erfarenhet av Java i större system
* Djup kunskap inom Spring / Spring Boot och modern Java-utveckling
* Erfarenhet av reaktiva ramverk (Project Reactor, RxJava eller liknande)
* Stark förståelse för arkitektur, ramverksdesign och API-kontrakt
* Erfarenhet av att driva migreringar från legacy till moderna plattformar
* Vana att bygga plattformar, inte bara enskilda tjänster
* Förmåga att se helheten: utvecklarupplevelse, drift, stabilitet och tempo
* Bekväm i en ledande teknisk roll utan formellt personalansvar


 Det är extra meriterande om du har erfarenhet av:
   

  

* Observability (OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana)
* Eventdriven arkitektur och messaging
* CI/CD, containerplattformar och Kubernetes


 Interna utvecklarplattformar eller platform-as-a-product-tänk
   

  

**Vi erbjuder**
 En strategiskt viktig roll med stort tekniskt mandat
   

  

* Möjligheten att vara med och bygga en framtidssäker identitetsplattform
* Ett team med hög kompetens och ett starkt säkerhetsfokus
* En kultur där vi kombinerar teknikintresse med ett äkta fokus på människor och samhälle


**Fortnox - mitt i företagslivet**
*Fortnox hjälper företag att starta, växa och utvecklas. Med smarta tekniska lösningar för företag och redovisningsbyråer, smidig finansiering och ett ekosystem av starka partnerskap är Fortnox ett nav för företagande i Sverige. Vi drivs av visionen om ett välmående samhälle format av framgångsrika företag.*
*Fortnox grundades 2001 med huvudkontor i Växjö. Läs mer på www.fortnoxgroup.com.*
**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Market Developer
description:

* Excellent interpersonal skills

* Strong verbal and written communication and presentation skills

**Desired Skills**
* Self-confident

* Great organizational skills
* Strong interest in cloud services

**We Offer**
* Competitive compensation
* Premium equipment
* 20+ paid vacation days
* Personalised career path
* An international, friendly and collaborative environment
* Hybrid work model
* Possibility for learning and self-realisation
* Flat hierarchy and inclusive environment


**About PCG**
 Public Cloud Group (PCG) supports companies in their digital transformation through the use of public cloud solutions.
   

  

 With a product portfolio designed to accompany organisations of all sizes in their cloud journey and competence that is a synonym for highly qualified staff that clients and partners like to work with, PCG is positioned as a reliable and trustworthy partner for the hyperscalers, relevant and with repeatedly validated competence and credibility.
   

  

 We have the highest partnership status with the three relevant hyperscalers: Amazon Web Services (AWS), Google, and Microsoft. As experienced providers, we advise our customers independently with cloud implementation, application development, and managed services.

title: Staff Software Engineer, Core Engine
description:
**The opportunity**
 We're looking for a Staff Engineer to join the Runtime team within the Core Engine group here at Unity. You'll be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining the low-level systems that form the backbone of the Unity runtime. You'll work across subsystems including transforms, the player loop, the job system, serialization, and support higher level features like physics and netcode. Your work will directly impact the performance, stability, and capabilities available to millions of developers worldwide.
   

  

 This is a highly technical individual contributor role with significant influence over architectural decisions and engineering practices. You'll collaborate closely with teams across rendering, physics, animation, scripting, and platform engineering to ensure the core engine meets the evolving needs of real-time 3D content creation.
   

  

 This role requires deep expertise in C++ and systems programming, a track record of technical leadership, and the ability to mentor engineers while driving critical initiatives that shape how creators build with Unity.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Design and implement core runtime systems with a focus on performance, memory efficiency, and cross-platform compatibility
* Lead technical initiatives spanning multiple teams, driving alignment on architecture and implementation approaches
* Profile, analyze, and optimize engine performance across diverse hardware targets including consoles, mobile devices, desktop, and emerging platforms
* Mentor and support engineers across the organization, raising the bar for code quality and engineering rigor
* Contribute to technical strategy and roadmap planning for the core engine
* Write clear technical documentation and participate in design reviews
* Debug complex, system-level issues that span multiple subsystems
* Evaluate and integrate new platform capabilities and hardware features


**What We're Looking For**
* Extensive experience in systems programming, with deep expertise in C++
* Proven experience building and shipping low-level engine or runtime systems at scale
* Strong understanding of computer architecture, memory hierarchies, cache behavior, and CPU/GPU interaction
* Experience with multithreaded programming
* Familiarity with multiple platforms (Windows, macOS, Linux, consoles, mobile) and their toolchains
* Track record of leading cross-team technical initiatives and influencing engineering direction
* Excellent debugging and profiling skills
* Strong written and verbal communication skills


**You might also have**
* Experience with game engine development (Unity, Unreal, proprietary engines)
* Experience with C# and the managed runtime
* Familiarity with SIMD programming
* Experience with Burst, LLVM, or other compiler technologies
* Contributions to open-source projects or published technical writing


**Additional Information**
* Relocation support is not available for this position


**Benefits**
 At Unity, we want our team members to thrive. We offer a wide range of benefits designed to support well-being and work-life balance.
   

  

 Please note: Benefits eligibility, specific offerings, and coverage vary based on the country and employment status.
   

  

 While specific benefits vary, here are some of the ways we strive to take care of our eligible team members globally: Comprehensive health, life, and disability insurance | Commute subsidy | Employee stock ownership | Competitive retirement/pension plans | Generous vacation and personal days | Support for new parents through leave and family-care programs | Office food snacks | Mental Health and Wellbeing programs and support | Employee Resource Groups | Global Employee Assistance Program | Training and development programs | Volunteering and donation matching program
   

  

**Life at Unity**
 Unity [NYSE: U] is the world’s leading game engine, powering play for more than 3 billion consumers each month. The top mobile games in the world, the most played PC indie titles, the most innovative console games, and virtually all of the top XR and Web Games are developed, deployed, and grown in Unity. Unity also enables teams across industries like automotive, manufacturing, and healthcare to design, simulate, and collaborate in 3D — closing the gap between ideas and reality. For more information, please visit www.unity.com.
   

  

*Unity is a proud equal opportunity employer. We are committed to fostering an inclusive, innovative environment and celebrate our employees across age, race, color, ancestry, national origin, religion, disability, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, or any other protected status in accordance with applicable law. Our differences are strengths that enable us to support the growing and evolving needs of our customers, partners, and collaborators.* 
*If you have a disability that means there are preparations or accommodations we can make to help ensure you have a comfortable and positive interview experience, please fill out* 
*this form* 
*to let us know.*
*This position requires the incumbent to have a sufficient knowledge of English to have professional verbal and written exchanges in this language since the performance of the duties related to this position requires frequent and regular communication with colleagues and partners located worldwide and whose common language is English.*
*Headhunters and recruitment agencies may not submit resumes/CVs through this website or directly to managers. Unity does not accept unsolicited headhunter and agency resumes. Unity will not pay fees to any third-party agency or company that does not have a signed agreement with Unity.*
*Your privacy is important to us. Please take a moment to review our* 
*Prospect* 
*and* 
*Applicant* 
*Privacy Policies. Should you have any concerns about your privacy, please contact us at DPO@unity.com.*
 #SEN

title: Staff Software Engineer (Scala) - Remote Work
description:
At BairesDev®, we've been leading the way in technology projects for over 15 years. We deliver cutting-edge solutions to giants like Google and the most innovative startups in Silicon Valley.
 



  





 Our diverse 4,000+ team, composed of the world's Top 1% of tech talent, works remotely on roles that drive significant impact worldwide.
 



  





 When you apply for this position, you're taking the first step in a process that goes beyond the ordinary. We aim to align your passions and skills with our vacancies, setting you on a path to exceptional career development and success.
 



  





 Staff Software Engineer (Scala) at BairesDev
 



  





 We’re looking for a Staff Software Engineer with deep Scala expertise and a thorough understanding of distributed data processing systems from the inside out. You’ve moved beyond writing performant code — you define how stream and batch processing infrastructure is architected, and you have the cross-team influence to make those decisions stick. You’ll be contributing to open source data platform technology used by leading enterprises globally, in a role where your architectural thinking and technical leadership shape how the platform evolves.
 



  





 What You’ll Do:
 



  





 - Lead the design and development of distributed data processing systems in Scala, focused on scalability and long-term reliability.
 



 - Define technical direction for stream and batch processing infrastructure across engineering teams.
 



 - Apply deep knowledge of distributed systems internals to guide architecture decisions and resolve complex challenges.
 



 - Drive JVM performance strategy and optimization practices across the data platform.
 



 - Collaborate with stakeholders and engineering teams to deliver impactful, lasting platform improvements.
 



 - Mentor engineers and lead cross-team initiatives that raise the technical standard of the data platform.
 



  





 What We Are Looking For:
 



  





 - 7+ years of experience in IT roles.
 



 - 5+ years of experience with Scala as a primary language in distributed systems or data platform engineering.
 



 - Expert knowledge of distributed systems architecture and large-scale data processing design.
 



 - Deep experience with stream or batch processing internals and the frameworks that power them.
 



 - Strong JVM performance expertise applied to production data processing systems.
 



 - Apache ecosystem contribution experience is a plus.
 



 - Demonstrated ability to lead cross-team technical initiatives and influence engineering direction.
 



 - Advanced proficiency in English.
 



  





  





  





 How we do make your work (and your life) easier:
 



  





 - Remote Work.
 



 - Excellent compensation in USD or your local currency if preferred
 



 - Hardware and software setup for you to work from home.
 



 - Flexible hours: create your own schedule.
 



 - Paid parental leaves, vacations, and national holidays.
 



 - Innovative and multicultural work environment: collaborate and learn from the global Top 1% of talent.
 



 - Supportive environment with mentorship, promotions, skill development, and diverse growth opportunities.
 



  





 Join a global team where your unique talents can truly thrive and make a significant impact!
 



  





 Apply now!

title: Quantexa Developer (f/m/x)

You will design and maintain Quantexa and Spark-based applications that identify suspicious activities and potential money laundering patterns within large-scale financial data environments.
   

  

 This is a hands-on role combining data engineering, Quantexa development, and system stability responsibilities, offering the opportunity to work on critical systems that enhance transparency and trust in financial operations.
   

  

****Your tasks****
* Drive release management and deployment activities
* Design, build, and maintain Quantexa and data applications using the Spark Framework
* Contribute to agile development processes and continuous improvement
* Collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams to deliver stable and scalable solutions
* Provide production support, managing escalations and ensuring system stability


**Requirements**
* Quantexa Certification
* Proven experience implementing Quantexa cross-border transaction monitoring use cases for AML/financial crime prevention

title: Senior Business Developer
description:
**SENIOR BUSINESS DEVELOPER AUTOMATION - kunds räkning** 




  





**Vi söker** 




 Vi söker nu en
 **Senior Business Developer** 
 till ett Content Automation & Production team hos ett globalt retailföretag.
 



  





 På företaget skalar man upp hur digitalt innehåll skapas, anpassas och levereras över marknader globalt, med paid social som ett primärt fokus. Content automation är en nyckel i denna resa och möjliggör snabbhet, relevans och prestanda utan att kompromissa med kreativ kvalitet.
 



  





 Detta är en senior specialistroll med ett starkt mandat att utveckla området från start till mål. Du kommer att definiera arbetssätt, designa skalbara processer och koppla samman kreativitet, media, data och teknik till ett sammanhängande produktionsekosystem.
 



  





 Du kommer att arbeta nära globala team, marknader, plattformar, mediebyråer, teknikpartners med flera för att säkerställa att automatiserad innehållsproduktion skapar verkligt affärs- och varumärkesvärde.
 



  





**Arbetsbeskrivning** 



* Bygga och vidareutveckla ett globalt ramverk för automatiserad och skalbar innehållsproduktion
* Designa end-to-end-processer från kreativ input till publicerat material över kanaler och marknader
* Övervaka global innehållsproduktion samt vägleda och samordna alla involverade roller
* Ansvara för samarbeten med externa partners för att säkerställa smidiga och tillförlitliga produktionsflöden
* Översätta affärs- och varumärkesbehov till tydlig produktionslogik och systemkrav
* Definiera standarder, styrning och kvalitetsnivåer för automatiserat innehåll
* Driva kontinuerliga förbättringar genom att identifiera brister, ineffektivitet och nya möjligheter
* Agera global ämnesexpert och rådgivare inom content automation



  





**Din profil** 



* Senior specialist med erfarenhet av att bygga och skala automatiserad eller teknikdriven innehållsproduktion
* God förståelse för paid social, dynamiskt innehåll och digitala medieekosystem
* Bekväm med att arbeta i skärningspunkten mellan kreativitet, teknik, data och prestation
* Mycket strukturerad, processdriven och affärsinriktad
* Trivs i globala, tvärfunktionella miljöer och leder genom expertis



  





**Övrig information** 




 Uppdraget är ett konsultuppdrag på 6 månader, heltid med start omgående. Kontoret är i centrala Stockholm, på plats 4 dagar per vecka (ej remote). Låter det intressant? Skicka gärna in din ansökan idag.
 



  





*WorkStudio arbetar med kompetensbaserad metodik i sina rekryteringar och hanterar alla kvalificerade ansökningar utan hänsyn till kön, ålder och bakgrund.*

title: Senior Python Developer (f/m/x)
description:
Join Sii Sweden to strengthen the technical backbone of a large-scale retail platform. You’ll work in the intersection of software development, automation, and infrastructure, helping ensure reliable, secure, and efficient provisioning, deployment, and configuration management across retail and data centre environments.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with development, infrastructure, and QA/lab teams to design, maintain, and evolve the tools and systems used for repeatable deployments in distributed environments.
   

  

****Your tasks****
* Building and maintaining Python-based tools and automation scripts
* Developing and improving a YAML-driven deployment and configuration framework
* Integrating and operating automation and platform components
* Supporting automation workflows for bare-metal provisioning and virtualized infrastructure
* Enabling stable and repeatable testing and deployment together with QA and lab teams
* Contributing to architectural discussions with a focus on scalability, maintainability, and security
* Sharing knowledge, supporting other engineers, and contributing to documentation and best practices


**Requirements**
* Strong experience developing in Python
* Solid Linux administration background
* Hands-on experience with configuration management and CI/CD
* Understanding of virtualization and provisioning workflows
* Good knowledge of networking fundamentals and IP management concepts
* Familiarity with identity, secrets management, and monitoring

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
**Rollen:**
* Ingestion och modellering av data: arbeta med verkliga dataanvändningsfall för att bygga pipelines, applicera anonymisering och skapa återanvändbara dataprodukter i Databricks
* Skapa golden paths: definiera standardmönster och verktyg för publicering, versionering och konsumtion av dataprodukter — inklusive SDK:er, dokumentation och mallar
* Operationalisera compliance: bygga in funktioner för integritet och governance i plattformen (t.ex. GDPR, RtBF, dataklassificering, anonymiseringsramverk)
* Samarbeta tvärfunktionellt: arbeta nära plattforms-, infrastruktur-, ingenjörs- och analysteam för att göra plattformen eller dess dataprodukter användbara, säkra och värdeskapande från dag ett.


**Ska-krav:**
* Har 7+ års praktisk erfarenhet som software- eller data engineer
* Har djup erfarenhet av Databricks, inklusive Unity Catalog, Delta Lake, workspace-setup och data engineering
* Är bekant med Azure, särskilt i relation till att köra Databricks i Azure.
* Har jobbat med Terraform och Infrastructure as Code-verktyg
* Förstår data governance och integritetskrav — och har implementerat lösningar för anonymisering, pseudonymisering eller åtkomstkontroll
* Har erfarenhet av orkestrering av pipelines och jobb i Databricks-miljö
* Djup erfarenhet av Python och SQL, samt CLI-verktyg och Git-baserade arbetsflöden
* Är pragmatisk — du balanserar struktur och snabbhet, och gillar att leverera iterativt
* Gillar att samarbeta mellan team, dokumentera ditt arbete och hjälpa andra att lyckas


**Meriterande:**
* Har byggt eller integrerat datasetkataloger, verktyg för metadataspårning eller Backstage-plugins
* Har kunskap och praktisk erfarenhet att jobba i en data mesh, intern plattformsdesign eller developer experience
* Har erfarenhet av Power BI, datamodellering för analys och slutanvändares databehov


**Var god förklara hur du uppfyller alla kraven.
   

  

 Omfattning:** 
 100%
   

  

**Ort:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Period** 
 : 06-04-2026-05-04-2027
   

  

**Sista ansökningdag:** 
 26-03-2026
