 - 3 days in Client or Infosys Office with frequent travel to meet other customers
   

  

 Today, the corporate landscape is dynamic, and the world ahead is full of possibilities! None of the amazing things we do at Infosys would be possible without an equally amazing culture, the environment where ideas can flourish and where you are empowered to move forward as far as your ideas will take you.
   

  

 At Infosys, we assure that your career will never stand still, we will inspire you to build what’s next and we will navigate further together. Our journey of learnability, values and trusted relationships with our clients continue to be the cornerstones of our organization and these values are upheld only because of our people.
   

  

**Your role**
 In the role of Program Manager, you are a expert ServiceNow and Project Management expert contributing to different phases of the Service Management tool solution lifecycle. You will be intensely involved in solution design, architecture advice, and driving project execution w.r.t ServiceNow as Service Management Platform. You will also play an important role in delivering strategic medium to long term projects, delivering above designed solution transforming customer’s Service Management tool landscape. You will also mentor and manage teams delivering projects around ServiceNow implementation / transformation, review deliverables and ensure noiseless delivery in the projects. As PM, expectations will be to be a Client Advisor applying your domain knowledge, thought leadership and subject matter expertise while managing various aspects of project management including but not restricted to planning, timeline adherence, governance, and budgeting. You will have the opportunity to collaborate with some of the best talent in the industry to create innovative high quality and defect-free solutions to meet our clients’ business needs. You will be part of a learning culture, where teamwork and collaboration are encouraged, excellence is rewarded, and diversity is respected and valued.
   

  

**Experience**
* Individual Postgraduate with minimum 8 years of experience OR Engineering graduate with minimum 10 Years of work ex OR non-Engineering graduate with minimum of 11 years’ work experience.
* Proven experience in Delivering ServiceNow Solutions to large customers
* Minimum 7 years of Project Management, implementing and supporting global ITSM platform solution with ServiceNow as preferred tool in Europe with large enterprises


**Required:**
* Project Management and Team Management
* Standard Project Management activities like
* Help define project scope, planning, goals and deliverables
* Able to identify core project team members and manage the project against set deliverables
* Enforce project timelines, guidelines, manage project budgets, allocations, and resourcing requirements
* Able to plan and project deployment of critical deliverables, track and update deviations and work on building performance improvement plans (People, Process, Technology Focus)
* Support and direct team
* Risk Management
* Lead quality assurance
* Monitor and report on project progress
* Present to stakeholders reports on progress as well as problems and solutions
* Implement and manage change when necessary to meet project outputs
* Evaluate and assess the result of the project
* Support relevant stakeholders to define and document the problem and the high-level solution to solve large/complex prospects, support/owns the problem definition and documentation
* Ability to analyze the customer/client issues and provide relevant solution, anticipate customer needs, and provide inputs for solutioning. Able to build client confidence
* Should have strong business value articulation skills
* Able to liaise with customer/client key stakeholders and drive strategic planning and improvement initiatives
* Ability to manager a large team of 15 or more implementation specialists and often multiple smaller projects closely working with team in India
* Ensure financial control and reporting for the project & program.


**Domain Knowledge**
* Demonstrate thorough understanding of industry standard, regulation in one area such as, Manufacturing,Telecom, Pharma, Retail, FS etc. to suggest relevant enhancements for simple gaps and compliance.
* Demonstrates a deep understanding of ITIL best practices as core skill
* Understands the IT Services landscape at various levels. Understands how to manage delivery / sales in an IT business environment.
* Certified on industry best practices such as:
* PMP Certification or equivalent
* SAFE or equivalent Agile Certification
* ITIL Certification
* Service Now Certification Presales Certification at a minimum


**Knowledge Management And Thought Leadership**
 Create Knowledge, share and drive the adoption of knowledge for his /her focus areas, share knowledge with/amongst key team members, conduct workshops and session periodically/ requirement basis
   

  

 Showcase innovation by contribute to the organizational skill and building innovative reusable solutions
   

  

 Applies in depth knowledge of the principles of industry lexicon, competitor landscape sub-verticals and related best practices to provide insight to the customers across the entire function
   

  

**Personal**
 Besides the professional qualifications of the candidates, we place great importance in addition to various forms personality profile. These include:
   

  

* High analytical skills
* A high degree of initiative and flexibility
* High customer orientation
* High quality awareness
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* Fluent in German and English


**Why Infosys**
 Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 46 countries to navigate their digital transformation.
   

  

 With nearly four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.
   

  

 To learn more about Infosys and see our ideas in action please visit us at www.Infosys.com
   

  

 “All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.”

title: Systemutvecklare UX/Front End – skapa användarupplevelser i flygplatsmiljö
description:
**Vi söker en Senior UX & Frontendutvecklare för att stärka upp vårt team!**
 Här får du arbeta i en utvecklingsnära miljö där teknik, användarupplevelse och verksamhetsnytta går hand i hand. Du bidrar till lösningar som används i en dynamisk flygplatsverksamhet och arbetar tillsammans med engagerade kollegor i ett öppet och kompetensdrivet team.
   

  

**Vad innebär rollen?**
 Som systemutvecklare med inriktning UX/Front End blir du en nyckelperson i Swedavias IT-utvecklingsenhet, där vi utvecklar och förvaltar digitala lösningar som får vardagen att fungera på våra tio flygplatser runt om i Sverige. Våra system är affärskritiska och används dagligen i en komplex och samhällsviktig verksamhet, som exempelvis Departure Sequence Tool (DST), ett system som i realtid optimerar startordningen för flyg samt Airport Operations Planning (AOP), som är centralt för planering och koordinering av flygplatsens dagliga drift.
   

  

 Du blir en del av vårt engagerade Operations-team med drygt tio kollegor. Tillsammans kombinerar vi djup teknisk kompetens med stark verksamhetsförståelse. Här finns systemutvecklare, UX-designer, krav- och testkompetens, lösningsarkitekter och scrum master, och vi arbetar nära både användare och andra utvecklingsgrupper inom organisationen.
   

  

 I rollen får du ett helhetsansvar som spänner över UX, nyutveckling och vidareutveckling/förvaltning. Du är med från idé till färdig lösning och har möjlighet att påverka både teknikval och användarupplevelse.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Du har en bred och verksamhetsnära kompetens inom UX och frontendutveckling och bidrar till att skapa användarvänliga och stabila lösningar. För att vara aktuell för tjänsten har du 3–4 års erfarenhet av:
   

  

* Designarbete i Figma
* HTML, CSS och responsiv webbdesign
* TypeScript/JavaScript
* Utveckling i Angular


 Meriterande med erfarenhet av:
   

  

* C# och .NET
* Agil utveckling
* Arbete med UX nära användare och verksamhet
* Extra meriterande med erfarenhet inom Microsoft Azure


 Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och goda kunskaper i engelska, både i tal och skrift då arbetet innebär samarbete och dokumentation på båda språken.
   

  

 Du är en kommunikativ och samarbetsinriktad person som trivs med att driva utvecklingen framåt tillsammans med andra. Du har ett starkt användarfokus och gillar att omsätta verksamhetsbehov till praktiska och eleganta tekniska lösningar. Samtidigt är du strukturerad, kvalitetsmedveten och tar gärna eget initiativ. Du uppskattar en arbetsmiljö där kunskapsdelning, långsiktighet och ständiga förbättringar står i fokus.
   

  

**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 Hos oss på Swedavia får du arbeta i ett kompetent och inkluderande team där vi värdesätter både samarbete och olika perspektiv. Vi erbjuder en stabil och långsiktig miljö där du kan utvecklas, påverka riktningen framåt och bidra med din expertis i en verksamhet där teknik och samhällsnytta går hand i hand.
   

  

 Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Niklas Forsberg, niklas.forsberg@swedavia.se
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag är den 12 april, urval sker löpande och annonsen kan stängas tidigare så tveka inte att söka redan idag!**
**Hur är det att arbeta på Swedavia?**
 Vårt fokus är att möjliggöra hållbart resande och uppmuntra nytänkande för att skapa en välkomnande, trygg och inkluderande arbetsgemenskap där du kan växa och göra verklig skillnad – läs mer här! Jobba hos oss | Om Swedavia
   

  

 För en objektiv och rättvis rekrytering använder vi arbetspsykologiska tester som en del av urvalsprocessen.
   

  

 Då flygplatser är en säkerhetsklassad verksamhet genomgår samtliga kandidater som går vidare i rekryteringsprocessen en bakgrundskontroll. För vissa tjänster även en säkerhetsprövning. Swedavia är även en drogfri arbetsplats med nolltolerans mot droger. Drogtester genomförs före anställning och sker slumpmässigt under anställningen.

title: Account Solution Engineer
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

**What is an Account Solution Engineer?**
 Also known as a “Presales”, “Solution Advisor”, “Sales Consultant,” or “Sales Engineer” the Account Solution Engineer is responsible for owning the solutions throughout the sales cycle and delivering thought leadership to companies to transform their customer’s experience. The Solution Engineer is an expert who works alongside their colleagues, participates in building our team culture and supports their aligned sales team to create solutions for prospects and customers.
   

  

 To accomplish this, you should have a strong desire to set the vision translating business objectives into enticing and practical recommendations. The Solution Engineer acts as a trusted advisor to our customers while aiding the customer’s transformational journey.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Strategic Customer Engagement: Partner with sales teams to drive digital transformation initiatives for automotive and manufacturing enterprises, positioning Salesforce as the platform for the agentic enterprise where AI agents work alongside humans to drive business outcomes
* Solution Architecture & Design: Lead technical discovery sessions to understand complex business processes across manufacturing operations, supply chain, dealer networks, and customer experience, translating requirements into comprehensive Salesforce solutions spanning across the portfolio
* Agentic AI Evangelism: Demonstrate and articulate how Agentforce and autonomous AI agents can transform customer-facing and internal operations—from intelligent service agents handling customer inquiries to autonomous SDR agents qualifying leads and autonomous sales coaches optimizing rep performance
* Value-Based Selling: Build and present compelling business cases that connect technical solutions to measurable business outcomes, focusing on revenue growth through platform expansion, cross-cloud opportunities, and demonstrating clear ROI
* Demo/Workshop/Proof of Concept Execution: Design and deliver impactful demonstrations, customer workshops and POCs that showcase the art of the possible, that drives operational efficiency in automotive/manufacturing contexts
* Trusted Advisor Relationship Building: Establish yourself as a strategic technology advisor to C-level and senior technical stakeholders, understanding their industry challenges around lead-to-cash, connected products, dealer management, warranty management, and evolving customer expectations
* Platform Expansion & Land-and-Expand Strategy: Identify opportunities to expand Salesforce footprint within existing accounts by uncovering new use cases across departments and business units, driving NNAOV through strategic platform growth
* Collaboration & Knowledge Sharing: Work closely with product specialists, industry advisors, architects, and customer success teams to ensure seamless handoffs and contribute to the broader solution engineering community through knowledge sharing and best practice documentation


 Key Attributes & Experience
   

  

* Solution Engineering Excellence: Proven track record as a pre-sales solution engineer, sales engineer, or technical consultant successfully supporting complex software sales cycles
* Business Acumen: Demonstrated ability to think strategically about business value rather than just technical features, with experience building business cases, ROI models, and value realization frameworks that resonate with executive buyers
* Growth Mindset: Intellectual curiosity and commitment to continuous learning in a rapidly evolving technology landscape, particularly around AI/ML, data platforms, and industry-specific innovations
* Customer-Centric: Consultative approach with exceptional listening skills and the ability to ask insightful discovery questions that uncover both stated and unstated customer needs
* AI & Automation Fluency: Understanding of how artificial intelligence, machine learning, and autonomous agents are reshaping business processes, with ability to translate technical AI capabilities into business outcomes
* Communication skills: Polished communication and presentation skills with the confidence to engage C-suite executives, technical architects, and operational managers alike, adapting your message and medium to each audience
* Collaborative Team Player: Experience working in matrix organizations, partnering effectively with account executives, customer success managers, product teams, technical architects as well as external partners to drive customer outcomes
* Language Skills: Professional English proficiency required. Salesforce company language is English incl. corporate communication and meetings.
* Proven Track Record: History of meeting or exceeding sales quotas through technical contribution, with metrics demonstrating impact on win rates, deal size, and sales cycle velocity


**Preferred Skills And Experience**
* Experiences with solutions in the customer experience area - e.g Marketing, Sales, Service, Field Service, ecommerce, CPQ
* Prior experience in Engineering, Computer Science, MIS, ERP or equivalent fields.
* Hands-on experience with Salesforce platform configuration, including exposure to Flow, Lightning Web Components, or Apex development
* Previous experience and/or certification in Salesforce solutions such as Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Field Service, Revenue Cloud, B2B Commerce.
* Understanding of modern data architecture concepts including data lakes, real-time integration, API management, and master data management
* Experience with AI/ML platforms, prompt engineering, or implementing intelligent automation solutions
* Development skills/methodology.
* Experience with value engineering methodologies, business case development tools, or value realization frameworks
* Understanding of European data privacy regulations (GDPR) and compliance requirements
* Project management or Agile methodology certifications
* Experience in presenting and hosting webinars or public speaking..
* Active participation in Salesforce community, Trailhead accomplishments, or speaking engagements at industry events


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: Fullstack Developer (Frontend & UX/UI focused)
description:
Be part of a team that shapes critical digital systems and take the opportunity to play a key role in an organization where your contribution truly matters. At
 **MU (Mercuri Urval)** 
 , you will develop and maintain applications used by leaders, candidates and consultants worldwide, influencing user experiences, technical solutions and the evolution of our digital services.
 



  





 Mercuri Urval is a science-based global Leadership Acquisition and Advisory firm with more than 50 years of experience helping organizations secure effective, diverse and sustainable leadership. We work with over 3,000 clients across all sectors in more than 60 countries every year, providing Executive Search, Leadership Assessment and Coaching services built on science based methods, tools and ethical standards.
 



  





**About the role** 




 As fullstack developer you will play a central part in shaping how Mercuri Urval’s digital systems look, feel and perform. You will be the go-to person for frontend and UX/UI and as part of a small, collaborative team you will have real influence over technical decisions, product direction and the end-to-end development of key systems.
 



  





**You will:** 



* Design, develop, and enhance user-friendly, robust web applications
* Lead frontend and UX/UI development across critical business core systems
* Take technical responsibility throughout the entire lifecycle: from idea to design, development, testing, release and maintenance
* Collaborate closely with business stakeholders, to translate complex requirements into sustainable solutions
* Contribute to architecture decisions, technical standards and code quality



  





**About you** 




 To succeed in this role, you thrive in a team environment, are flexible, open-minded and unpretentious. You have a positive, solution-oriented mindset and understand that success depends as much on maintaining solid foundations as it does on improving processes. You enjoy working across different areas, engaging with multiple stakeholders, and taking ownership of outcomes.
 



  





**You have:** 



* Several years of experience in frontend development: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Blazor
* Several years of experience in backend development: .NET, C#, SQL Server, REST APIs
* Solid understanding of software architecture, responsive design, accessibility, and UX/UI principles
* Experience with version control (Git) and agile development methodologies
* Fluency in English (spoken and written); Swedish is an advantage



  





 It is a plus if you have experience with DevOps practices, creating wireframes, prototypes and user flows, developing software for regulated or high-compliance industries such as finance, healthcare, or government, and if you have an understanding of organizational business processes, particularly sales processes (CRM) or recruitment and people management (HR systems).
 



  





**Interested?** 




 In this recruitment, Mercuri Urval is collaborating with Computer Sweden Recruitment. If you are interested or have any questions, you are very welcome to contact Alexandra Tihinen, Recruitment Consultant, at +46 70 447 92 24 or
 **alexandra.tihinen@csrecruitment.se** 
 .
 



 To apply, please submit your CV or apply via LinkedIn.
 



  





**About Mercuri Urval** 




*Mercuri Urval (MU) is a Swedish Leadership Acquisition and Advisory firm operating globally. Our experts provide science-based, precisely tailored, quality assured and ethical Executive Search, Leadership Assessment and Coaching services in partnership with private and public sector clients worldwide. We exist to make sure organisations outperform through diverse and sustainably successful leadership. The headquarters is in Stockholm City but our expert teams operate worldwide; wherever our clients need us, we are there.* 




  





*Founded in 1967, our mission has ever since been to help leaders to succeed further and to deliver outstanding results to their organizations. With more than 50 years of experience behind us, and with our extensive global reach and sector expertise, we partner with our clients to increase the effectiveness of leadership.* 




  





*Mercuri Urval work with more than 3.000 clients - across all sectors - in over 60 countries every year. As we have grown, our services have expanded to include a range of services, built to meet our clients’ needs to strengthen their people’s performance. Today it is clear, that securing effective leadership is one of the biggest challenges organisations face. Guided by science, we offer reliable leadership advice.*

title: Senior Process Excellence Manager (m/f/d)
description:
Everyone's story matters. Come shape your story with us at Riverty.
   

  

**But where does that take you?**
 To one of our 30 hybrid workspaces – designed for exchanging ideas, learning from others, and shaping the way we work. An international community of over 4,000 people, representing almost 80 nationalities across 11 countries. United by one mission: Combining empathy, advanced technology and data-driven insights to keep people and businesses in flow. With payments made for them. So that they don't have to worry about it.
   

  

**And there's more:** 
 We are part of the family-owned Bertelsmann group. Established. Corporate. In a fast-paced industry. We enable flexible payments in various industries, simplifying the financial management of known brands and helping people repay debt to build financial confidence. In short: shaping FinTech.
   

  

**We are looking for a**
**Senior Process Excellence Manager (m/f/d)**
**(unlimited, full-time) Join our team at one of our locations in Baden-Baden, Berlin, Verl, Amsterdam, Stockholm or Münster – flexible working conditions available.**
 We need someone who has experience in process mining and AI-enabled process transformation and a Lean Six Sigma Black Belt certification — someone who can not only see inefficiencies but systematically eliminate them. A Lean Six Sigma Black Belt who takes leadership in challenging excellence and shares their knowledge with their team in order to improve inefficiencies long term.
   

  

 This is not a passive process improvement role. It's a transformation driver position for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, data-rich environment, and wants to make impact at scale.
   

  

**Your Mission**
* You take the lead in analyzing and reimagining high-impact business and operational processes, uncovering efficiency wins and unlocking the potential of AI and automation
* You mentor others on structured improvement methods, and help embed excellence into daily operation by training process managers in the use of Lean Six Sigma framework
* You team up with stakeholders across business, operations, and IT to streamline and standardize processes, driving scalable and future-ready solutions
* You build resilient processes that run smoothly and smartly, by implementing real-time monitoring, alerting systems, and strong incident & problem management frameworks
* You spearhead Process Intelligence initiatives — from discovery to modeling to rollout, always focused on delivering measurable impact and clear ROI


**Your Skills & Experience**
* You are a certified Lean Six Sigma Black Belt with a strong track record of leading complex projects and delivering cost and time savings
* You have several years of process and / or operations excellence experience in an international environment
* You have a strong understanding of AI and automation capabilities in operations (Discovery and Business requirement definition in order to identify, frame, and scope high-value transformation efficiency opportunities)
* You are skilled in stakeholder facilitation, storytelling with data, and value-based prioritization
* You have a track record working at the interface of operations, IT, and data science
* You are fluent in English, German is a big plus.


**Plus if You Bring:**
* Advanced hands-on expertise in process mining tools (e.g. Celonis, Signavio)
* Experience leading global or cross-market transformation initiatives


**Why Join Riverty’s Global Process Excellence Team?**
* Drive company-wide operational improvements
* Work hands-on with the latest AI, automation, and process mining technologies
* Be part of a globally embedded, high-impact team across Europe
* Thrive in a collaborative culture that values bold thinking and smart execution


 Join Us — and Redesign the Way We Work
   

  

 If you're passionate about solving operational complexity with smart tools and structured thinking — we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity Employer Statement
   

  

 We want to be a fair and inclusive employer. We value the diverse perspectives that a diverse workforce brings to the table. Therefore, we are actively looking for people who enrich our company through their identity, background and personal experiences, with or without a disability.
   

  

**Benefits:**
* At Riverty, you can be who you are. We are committed to creating an inclusive environment and a culture of appreciation, enriched by our employee networks.
* Prioritize your health with supported sports and leisure activities.
* Take advantage of our numerous training and development opportunities! Enhance your skills with training offered by the Bertelsmann University, language courses, or leadership training.
* Benefit from our discounts on Bertelsmann products and financial incentives.
* With our diverse work models, you can tailor your work to your preferences. Take advantage of mobile office, flexible working hours, and part-time models.

title: Director Service Business Development, Global After Sales
description:
**Are you an experienced leader within service business, dealer development, or aftermarket operations who thrives in an international environment?** 




  





**Husqvarna Forest & Garden is strengthening its global aftermarket organization and is now looking for a Director Service Business Development to join the Global After Sales team. In this role, you will play a key part in developing and governing Husqvarna Forest & Garden’s global dealer service network and contribute to building a scalable, high-performing service organization.** 




  





 Husqvarna offers an exciting opportunity to work in a global environment where you will have a real impact on the development of the service business and the future customer experience across markets.
 



  





  





**Job description** 




 As Director Service Business Development, you will be responsible for developing and governing Husqvarna Forest & Garden’s global dealer service network, covering approximately 25,000–30,000 dealers worldwide. The role focuses on building structured frameworks, operating standards, and performance management systems to ensure high service quality and efficient aftermarket operations across markets.
 



  





 You will work closely with regional organizations and collaborate with stakeholders across Sales, Channel Management, Technical Support, Training, Quality, and Parts & Accessories.
 



 The position reports to the SVP Global After Sales, Service & Quality Europe and includes responsibility for a small global team.
 



  





**Your main tasks will be to:** 



* Develop and implement a global dealer service operating model, including standards for service delivery, warranty management, spare parts handling, and customer support
* Establish and manage performance frameworks, including KPIs, dashboards, audits, and governance structures across the dealer network
* Strengthen dealer capabilities across the service value chain, including certification frameworks, contract models, and network optimization
* Drive improvements in service quality, operational efficiency, and customer satisfaction across markets
* Act as a global integrator across regions and functions, supporting cross-functional collaboration and execution of key initiatives
* Lead and develop a global team, creating clarity, accountability, and a performance-driven culture



  





 The role can be based in Stockholm, Husqvarna, or Jonsered (Gothenburg) and international travel will be part of the position.
 



  





**Who are you?** 




 To succeed in the role as Director Service Business Development, you are business-oriented and execution-focused, with strong experience from service business, aftermarket operations, or dealer network development in an international environment.
 



  





 You are comfortable working across functions and regions and have the ability to translate strategic ambitions into structured initiatives and tangible results. You enjoy building strong relationships across organizations and have the leadership skills required to drive change and improvement in a global context.
 



  





**Requirements** 



* Proven experience from working with dealer networks, service business, or aftermarket operations
* Experience from working in international and cross-functional environments
* Strong understanding of service flows, warranty processes, and spare parts business
* Experience with KPIs, performance management systems, and operational frameworks
* Leadership experience and the ability to drive initiatives across organizations
* Academic degree in Engineering, Business Administration, or equivalent
* Fluency in English



  





 Experience from industrial B2B environments such as automotive, construction equipment, or industrial machinery is considered a strong advantage.
 



  





**Personal characteristics** 



* Strong execution capability with the ability to translate strategy into action
* Analytical and structured, with strong problem-solving skills
* Excellent interpersonal and communication skills
* Ability to build strong relationships and influence stakeholders across functions
* Ability to manage multiple initiatives and priorities simultaneously



  





**Company presentation** 




*We’re one of the world’s oldest start-ups — and we’re just getting started.* 




*At Husqvarna Group, innovation is in our DNA. With over 330 years of heritage and a passion for pioneering technology, we design and deliver world class products and solutions for forest, park, garden and construction care. From robotic lawn mowers to cutting-edge chainsaws and sustainable battery systems, we’re shaping the future — and we want you to be part of it.*

title: (Senior) Project Manager in Procurement / Supply Chain Management
description:
At Inverto, we specialize in strategic procurement and supply chain management. We work globally with market-leading companies, developing transformational strategies and implementing them to make their businesses stronger. And you can too – with our continued success, this is your chance to grow as we grow. Our teams want to succeed – and you’ll be in great company, working with people and in a business that supports you to thrive. There’s never been a better time to join us as we develop and build our future together. Are you in?
   

  

**How You'll Impact.**
**Holistic project management.**
 You will be responsible for the development and successful implementation of suitable strategies to optimize the supply chain and strategic procurement process. You will demonstrate your entrepreneurial talent in project controlling and in the acquisition of new customers.
   

  

**Broad range of challenges.**
 Broad customer portfolios and project assignments at home and abroad for a wide variety of industries and customers. From start-ups, retail, and consumer goods, to the energy and automotive industries or the pharmaceutical and healthcare sectors.
   

  

**Intensive customer consulting.**
 You will work closely with customers, be their main contact person and be responsible for conducting your team's workshops, negotiations and presentations.
   

  

**Specific development.**
 Your professional expertise will help to drive forward the development of knowledge in our company.
   

  

**Far-reaching responsibility.**
 You will ensure that your team develops both professionally and personally. As a member of the Inverto management team, you can help shape the development of our entire company and give it the necessary impetus.
   

  

**What You'll Bring.**
**University degree with above-average grades** 
 and 4-8 years of relevant professional experience.
   

  

**Extensive expertise in consulting,** 
 ideally in procurement / supply chain management and a passion for strategic and operational work.
   

  

**You have already proven your analytical and conceptual skills** 
 at management level in demanding projects. You show full commitment, are customer-oriented and cooperative. You have shown that you can successfully lead teams professionally and personally.
   

  

**You thrive in a team** 
 , stay grounded, treat others with fairness, and bring authenticity to every interaction.
   

  

 Confident appearance in an international environment,
 **business fluent in English** 
 (any other Nordic language is a plus), flexible in your professional mobility.
   

  

 TOGETHER, WE BENEFIT.
   

  

* Tailored training programs and personalized coaching designed to help you grow and thrive
* Flexible working hours and travel options that support parents and promote work-life balance
* A comprehensive insurance package for your peace of mind
* Access to mental coaching to foster your well-being, resilience, and personal growth
* Individual mobility packages
* Seasonal parties, team events, and get-togethers to foster collaboration and celebrate success
* A rewarding Employee Referral Program that allows you to help grow our team


 APPLY NOW!

title: Senior Director of Vendor Alliances EMEA
description:
Join
 **Pax8** 
 as our
 **Senior Director of Vendor Alliances** 
 and shape how thousands of partners access, adopt, and scale cloud solutions across EMEA. This is a pivotal leadership role where you’ll influence global strategy, elevate vendor performance, and grow alongside our rapidly evolving AI‑powered marketplace.
 



  





 📍This is a
 **hybrid** 
 role, based in
 **Stockholm, Sweden** 
 .
 



  





  





**✨Why this role matters** 




  





 You’ll sit at the heart of one of the most strategically important functions at Pax8 — steering relationships with our most critical vendors, building scalable programs for a rapidly growing ecosystem, and enabling partners to unlock meaningful commercial outcomes.
 



 With our accelerated investment in AI‑driven insights and automation, this is an exciting moment to join and help shape new ways of working across EMEA
 



  





  





**🌍What it’s like working at Pax8** 




  





 Pax8 is a global cloud marketplace trusted by tens of thousands of partners and recognised for our culture of curiosity, candour and collaboration. We’re a people‑first business with a strong presence across Europe, where our teams operate in modern, collaborative spaces with a warm, community‑driven culture.
 



  





  





**🌱Our Culture & Ways of Working** 




  





 At Pax8, culture isn’t a buzzword — it’s how we work, lead, and grow together.
 



  





 Explore more about who we are:
 


* Learn about our people, values, and purpose: Pax8 and our people
* Our EMEA 2025 journey: Pax8 2025 Year in Review
* See why we’re recognised as a Great Place to Work and Marketplace Channel of the Year 2025
* Our amazing Partners and Vendors: Pax8 Partners and Vendors in EMEA Honoured as Award Recipients at Beyond 2025
* The FOMO is Real: Pax8 Beyond 2025
* You would be joining a rapidly growing team and the Marketplace Channel of the Year 2025https://mspchannelawards.com/winners/2025



  





  





**What you’ll be doing** 




  





 🌍
 **Drive vendor strategy across EMEA** 




 Turn global vendor direction into effective regional execution, ensuring strategy alignment and measurable outcomes.
 



  





 📈
 **Accelerate vendor performance** 




 Champion programs such as Data‑Driven Sales and Security 360, enabling scalable adoption and sales impact.
 



  





 🤝
 **Lead and coach a multi‑country team** 




 Support leaders across the region, guide career growth, and foster a high‑performance culture built on trust and clarity.
 



  





 🔗
 **Strengthen strategic vendor relationships** 




 Work closely with senior vendor stakeholders to drive shared goals, improve execution, and create value for partners.
 



  





 🧭
 **Build scalable processes** 




 Establish governance, reporting, and execution frameworks that support future growth as our vendor ecosystem rapidly expands.
 



  





  





**🎯The impact you’ll make** 




  





 Your leadership will directly shape how Pax8 expands its EMEA vendor ecosystem — from accelerating adoption of strategic vendors to enabling our sales teams to win with stronger propositions. You’ll influence global thinking, support local execution, and help partners deliver exceptional outcomes for customers across the region.
 



  





  





**What you’ll bring** 




  





**Must‑haves** 




  




* Substantial experience operating within a modern B2B or indirect sales environment
* Proven ability to lead multi‑country teams and elevate performance
* Demonstrated success managing vendor relationships at scale
* Strong commercial judgement and the ability to drive results in a fast‑changing environment
* Inclusive, collaborative leadership style with a passion for building trusted partnerships
* Strategic mindset with the ability to simplify complexity and design scalable processes
* Fluency in English



  





  





**Nice‑to‑haves** 




  




* Familiarity with cybersecurity offerings or cloud‑based vendor ecosystems
* Comfort working with AI‑enabled tools and data‑driven decision making
* Additional European languages



  





*In order to fulfil this role you should be resident in this country with a valid right to work.* 




  





 We encourage you to apply even if you don't meet 100% of the criteria. We're committed to diverse perspectives, inclusive hiring and sharing your transferrable skills.
 



  





  





  





**⭐How we hire** 




  





 At Pax8, we care deeply about building genuine, trust based relationships — starting with how we hire. To protect our business, our teams, and our customers, we use a range of measures throughout the recruitment process to help confirm authenticity and prevent fraud. These safeguards are designed to be fair, respectful, and proportionate, and may evolve as risks change. By applying, you acknowledge that we take steps to verify identity and representation during hiring. If you're applying as your authentic self, you have nothing to worry about — we're excited to meet you. We also use thoughtfully applied AI-enabled tools to support our hiring process. These tools may assist with tasks such as reviewing or prioritising applications, but hiring decisions are made by our people. More information is available in our Recruitment Privacy Notice. If you have questions about how we hire or would prefer not to have your application supported by these tools, you can opt out at any part of our process.
 



  





**💰Salary and benefits** 




  





  




* Salary in between SEK 91k - 130k (monthly gross) depending on experience
* Bonus: Annual performance bonus
* Long term Incentive Plan (Stock Options)
* Medical Insurance
* Life and Accident Insurance
* Long Term Disability Insurance
* Pension Coverage
* Dedicated time for training and personal development
* Unlimited access to LinkedIn Learning
* Health & Wellbeing coaching support
* Fun and frequent company and team socials



  





  





  





**Your growth at Pax8** 




  





 There's extensive room for a talented individual to grow at pace — whether that's advancing quickly in this role or exploring one of the many opportunities across our global organisation. You'll have access to our internal development hub designed to accelerate your skills and stretch your potential. Alongside specialist Learning & Development trainers, you'll also tap into AI powered tools, "born in the cloud" mentors, and cross continent collaboration that broaden your perspective and sharpen your expertise. We'll give you the space, trust, and the right projects to help you thrive — and full visibility of what it takes to reach your next level.
 



  





  





**About Pax8** 




  





 Our mission is to be the world's favourite place to buy cloud products. We are a fast-growing, dynamic, and high-energy organisation with a start-up feel, allowing you to make a meaningful impact on the business. Culture is important to us, and at Pax8, it's business, and it IS personal. We are passionate, creative, and unconventional. We work hard, keep it fun, and expect the best! We
 **Elev8** 
 each other. We
 **Advoc8** 
 for our partners. We
 **Innov8** 
 continuously. We
 **Celebr8** 
 life.
 



  





  





**Pre‑employment checks** 




  





 As part of our hiring process, we are required to undertake pre-employment checks on all candidates that are successful in their application with Pax8. As part of these checks Pax8 will request ID verification, reference requests and qualification checks (additional checks may be completed for certain countries, such as criminal and financial). All checks are completed by our third-party provider, First Advantage. Once checks have been completed all candidates will receive a copy for their records.
 



  





  





**Equal opportunities** 




  





 Pax8 are an equal opportunities employer and welcome individuals who are in possession of the appropriate requirements to work within the country you have applied for. Offered individuals will be asked to undertake identity, security compliance and reference checks. Your privacy is important to us. Your data will be held in accordance with GDPR best practices and processed only in accordance with our recruiting processes.
 



 Privacy notice: https://www.pax8.com/en-us/terms/job-applicant-privacy-notice/

title: Anbudsspecialist sökes till Martin & Servera i Stockholm
description:
**Var med och gör varje dag lite godare!** 
 Är du en erfaren anbudsspecialist som vill vara med och fortsätta stärka vårt arbete inom vår försäljningsorganisation som jobbar med våra kedjekonstellationer och samtidigt utvecklar restaurangbranschen tillsammans med oss?
   

  

 Vi på Martin & Servera levererar mat, dryck och tjänster till restauranger och storkök, över hela Sverige. Som marknadsledare driver vi utvecklingen och jobbar hårt för att göra varje dag lite godare. I rollen som anbudsspecialist är du en viktig resurs för att utveckla affärerna kring sortiment och priser. Du har tät, ofta daglig kontakt med dina kunder och deltar regelbundet tillsammans med Key Account Manager i olika kundmöten och affärsförhandlingar.
   

  

 Du blir en del av vår avdelning Försäljning Kedja där vi arbetar med företagets privata kunder och kedjekonstellationer. Vi har en stark intern gemenskap där vi jobbar tillsammans, stöttar varandra och har roligt ihop.
   

  

**Ett hållbarhetsarbete i framkant.**
 Hållbart företagande är en integrerad del i hur vi inom Martin & Servera utvecklar affärer. Vi är övertygade om att företag kan förändra samhället till det bättre. Vår hållbarhetsstrategi bygger på att maximera affärs- och samhällsnytta och samtidigt minimera negativ påverkan på människa, djur och natur. Du blir en viktig del av det arbete som vi tillsammans gör varje dag för en mer hållbar framtid.
   

  

**Stabilt och långsiktigt.**
 Vi har en stark och långsiktig ägare i form av familjeägda Axel Johnson, vilket skapar både trygghet och stora utvecklingsmöjligheter inom koncernen.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig.**
 Hos oss får du ett spännande jobb med goda förmåner som till exempel ett generöst friskvårdsbidrag, sjukvårdande bidrag och lunchsubvention. Vi utmanar oss själva och värdesätter prestationer på samma sätt som vi värnar om en bra balans mellan jobb och privatliv. Vi erbjuder möjlighet till distansarbete två dagar i veckan. För oss är det viktigt med en trygg och säker arbetsmiljö, därför utför vi slumpmässiga drog- och alkoholtester på våra arbetsplatser.
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter.**
 Du kommer ansvara kring att samarbetet fungerar med några av företagets absolut största och viktigaste kunder samt utvecklas på ett långsiktigt och affärsmässigt sätt. Du kommer arbeta i nära samarbete med kollegorna inom anbud och försäljning samt övriga kollegor på Martin & Servera. Arbetet är varierande och du har en viktig koordinerande roll för att våra kunder ska uppleva oss som en professionell samarbetspartner.
   

  

* Upphandlingar på artikelnivå
* Ansvara för vård av prislistor och kontinuerliga prisjusteringar
* Strategisk utveckling av kundavtal
* Hantera förändringar i avtal och produktönskemål från kunder
* Dagligen uppdatera och säkerställa korrekt innehåll och kvalitet i befintliga avtal
* Ta fram statistik och löpande göra uppdateringar gällande pris, artiklar och kundinformation
* Göra lönsamhetsanalyser
* Koordinera och hjälpa våra kunder i olika ärenden
* Du har kontakt med leverantörer och där du jobbar nära vår inköpsorganisation kring vårt sortiment och priser.


**Viktigt för att jobbet ska passa dig.**
 Du arbetar strukturerat och organiserat. Du är analytisk och har ett starkt sinne för affärer och lönsamhet. Du har förmågan att analysera och utvärdera komplex datadriven information för affärsmässiga beslut. Du arbetar noggrant, metodiskt och målinriktat, med en förmåga att prioritera och arbeta självständigt. Du samarbetar med kollegor runt omkring i organisationen för att skapa win-win-situationer för kunden och Martin & Servera. Att du kan växla snabbt mellan arbetsuppgifter är viktigt, då arbetet stundtals har ett högt tempo. Det är därför viktigt att du trivs med att arbeta tillsammans med andra och att du bidrar med positiv energi. Du är en hjälpsam person som håller vad du lovar och brinner för att ge en utmärkt service till dina kunder. Vårt företag befinner sig på en resa för ökad digitalisering och därför är det viktigt att du har en stark framåtanda.
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen tror vi dessutom att du har:
   

  

* En inre drivkraft för att skapa lönsamma affärer, ett sinne för detaljer, noggrannhet och uthållighet som också gör att du kommer att trivas i rollen som anbudsspecialist
* Relevant utbildning, du har lägst gymnasiekompetens.
* Förmågan att läsa och förstå avtalstext och kunna formulera dig korrekt och effektivt på svenska i tal och skrift
* God IT-vana, framförallt Excel och affärssystem
* Att du trivs med att arbeta både enskilt och i grupp
* Stort intresse för mat och måltidsbranschen


**Hur går rekryteringen till?**
 Vi jobbar aktivt för mångfald och ser olikheter mellan människor som en styrka. Med målet att spegla alla våra kunder och samhället vi verkar i, söker vi människor i alla åldrar och med olika bakgrunder. I våra rekryteringar använder vi oss av personlighetstest. Det är för att kunna jämföra kandidater på ett så objektivt och rättvist sätt som möjligt. Vi gör också bakgrundskontroller. Läs mer om rekryteringsprocessen på vår hemsida.
   

  

 Sista ansökningsdag är 2026-03-30
   

  

 Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Anställningsform: Tillsvidaretjänst
   

  

 Sysselsättningsgrad: Heltid, 100%
   

  

 Adress: Lindhagensgatan 133, Stockholm
   

  

 Kontakt: Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Beatrice Sjöblom, Försäljningsledare Anbud, beatrice.sjoblom@martinservera.se. Vid frågor om rekryteringsprocessen är du välkommen att kontakta HR-partner Clara Holmstedt på clara.holmstedt@martinservera.se . Vi tar ej emot ansökningar via brev/mejl.
   

  

 Facklig företrädare: Anna-Lena Holsteryd 08-722 26 30.
   

  

 Martin & Servera är Sveriges ledande restauranggrossist och levererar dagligen drycker, färskvaror, livsmedel, utrustning, tjänster och kunskap till restauranger och storkök. Martin & Servera-gruppen består av moderbolaget Martin & Servera samt dotterbolagen Martin & Servera Restauranghandel med restaurangbutiker, Martin & Servera Logistik, Galatea och Sorundahallarna.
   

  

 Tillsammans gör vi på Martin & Servera-gruppen skillnad för alla som älskar mat och dryck. Med omtanke om varandra, våra kunder och vår planet gör vi varje dag lite godare. Som medarbetare hos oss är du en viktig del av vår framgång. Här tas dina erfarenheter, idéer och kunskaper tillvara och vi växer och utvecklas tillsammans. Välkommen till oss!

title: Enterprise Arkitekt – Utveckla Regeringskansliets Enterprise Arkitektur
description:
**Enheten Teknisk styrning och innovation, Digitaliseringsavdelningen**
 Regeringskansliet har till uppgift att göra regeringens politik till verklighet. För att kunna arbeta effektivt och säkert behövs en pålitlig digital infrastruktur med system, data och processer som stöttar Regeringskansliets arbete. Nu söker vi dig som vill vara med på förändringsresan mot en sömlös digital myndighet och bidra med din erfarenhet och digitala kompetens.
   

  

**Din arbetsdag. Sveriges morgondag.**
 Vi söker en erfaren EA till Regeringskansliets Digitaliseringsavdelning som är den drivande kraften bakom innovationsarbetet och digitaliseringen i myndigheten. Du kommer in i ett viktigt skede och får vara med och skapa, driva och förvalta delar av Regeringskansliets övergripande Enterprise Arkitektur: principer, riktlinjer, målarkitekturer och roadmaps.
   

  

 Du har tidigare arbetat som EA i en stor och komplex organisation, gärna offentlig. Med din erfarenhet och förmåga kommer du vara starkt bidragande till att förverkliga digitaliseringsstrategin.
   

  

**Din bakgrund**
 För att vara aktuell för rollen behöver du uppfylla alla skallkrav och gärna flera av de meriterande kriterierna.
   

  

**Krav:**
* Akademisk examen eller motsvarande erfarenhet inom relevant område.
* Erfarenhet av att leda förankring och arkitekturval utan formellt personalansvar (t.ex. i tvärfunktionella forum och initiativ).
* Mycket god förståelse för krav på säkerhet, integritet och regelefterlevnad i komplex verksamhet.
* Har kompetens att agera i flera i kompetensroller: Enterprise-, Verksamhets-, Informations-, Applikations-, Infrastruktur- samt IT-/Informationssäkerhetsarkitektur.
* Tidigare erfarenhet av att skapa en självbärande EA‑funktion där man samverkar internt och inte ”gör allt själva”.
* Tydlig och pedagogisk rådgivare som skapar samsyn och framdrift i komplexa frågor.


**Meriterande:**
* Relevanta certifieringar som IASA, CITA-A/CITA-P, TOGAF, ArchiMate eller motsvarande.
* Kännedom om BTABoK/ITABoK och metoder för värdemätning av arkitekturhälsa.
* Jobbat med arkitekturfrågor i statliga bolag eller andra statliga liknande myndigheter.
* Djup förståelse för GDPR, NIS2, säkerhetsskyddslagen och offentlighetsprincipen.
* Erfarenhet av att definiera och implementera molnpolicy, multi-cloud och hybridlösningar.
* Förmåga att skapa arkitektur som stödjer dataanalys, AI och automatisering.
* Har vana av standardiserad modellering (exempelvis ArchiMate, processmodeller, roadmaps)
* Erfarenhet av att bygga upp intern förmåga och utbilda organisationen, inte bara leverera eget arbete.
* Erfarenhet att säkerställa att EA blir ett praktiskt ”ledningsverktyg” inklusive dokumentation, modeller och underlag som icke‑tekniska chefer kan fatta beslut utifrån.


**Dina egenskaper**
 Som person är du tydlig och trygg i rådgivning och beslutsstöd. Du förklarar komplexa frågor enkelt och inspirerande och bygger tillit med olika intressenter. Du besitter god samarbetsförmåga och kommunicerar obehindrat med alla, både teknisk och icke-teknisk personal.
   

  

 Regeringskansliets medarbetarkriterier är helhet, utveckling, resultat. Alla som arbetar i Regeringskansliet behöver ha helhetssyn och samarbeta för verksamhetens bästa. Du förväntas bidra med ditt perspektiv och din kompetens samt vara öppen för andras. Du kommer med idéer och nya angreppssätt för att förbättra och utveckla verksamheten och din egen kompetens. Du är inriktad på resultat i ditt agerande och anpassar dig när behov och inriktning ändras.
   

  

 Läs mer på Medarbetarskap och ledarskap i Regeringskansliet - Regeringen.se
   

  

**Övrigt**
 Vi söker en eller flera erfarna Enterprise arkitekter. Rollen är en tillsvidareanställning som inleds med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Befattningen är placerad i säkerhetsklass och en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras innan beslut om anställning fattas. Du måste vara svensk medborgare, men får gärna ha utländsk bakgrund.
   

  

**Låter det intressant? Välkommen med din ansökan!**
 Vill du veta mer om jobbet och vad vi erbjuder, kontakta Maria Rune som är sektionschef. Du är också välkommen att kontakta rekryteringsspecialist Charlotta Cedermark för frågor kring rekryteringsprocessen.
   

  

 Fackliga kontaktpersoner är Johan Strokirk för Saco och Jan Wahlström för ST. Du når samtliga via Regeringskansliets växel, 08-405 10 00. Vi tar gärna emot samtal från dig som är intresserad av jobbet men vi tackar nej till dig som säljer annonser och rekryteringstjänster.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan
 **senast den 14 april 2026** 
 .
   

  

 Regeringskansliets uppdrag är att stödja regeringen i dess arbete med att styra Sverige och förverkliga sin politik. Här arbetar 4 800 personer, varav 600 utomlands. Regeringskansliet välkomnar sökande med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter. Vi ser jämställdhet och mångfald som en styrka och tillgång och vi arbetar aktivt för att vara en arbetsplats fri från diskriminering. Förvaltningsavdelningen ansvarar för myndighetsövergripande frågor som förändrings- och förnyelsearbete, ekonomi, arbetsgivarfrågor, kompetensförsörjning, kommunikation, säkerhet, it, bibliotek, arkiv och registratur samt för den gemensamma servicen i Regeringskansliet.

title: Agil produktägare med spets inom frontend
description:
Är du en agil produktägare som vill vara med och utveckla digitala lösningar för framtidens vård? Drivs du av att göra nytta och påverka samhället på riktigt? Då kan det här vara en roll för dig.
   

  

****Om tjänsten****
 I rollen som agil produktägare ingår du i ett utvecklingsteam där du har ett övergripande ansvar för teamets backlogg, prioriteringar och riktningen framåt. Du arbetar tvärfunktionellt och nära andra agila produktägare, produktansvariga och ledande roller för att säkerställa hög leveransförmåga och att vi arbetar mot gemensamma mål.
   

  

 Du ansvarar för att teamet arbetar med rätt saker vid rätt tidpunkt, samtidigt som du kontinuerligt kommunicerar med produktens användare för att fånga behov och omsätta dem till värdeskapande utveckling. Du får även möjlighet att samordna arbetet med både interna och externa intressenter och driver flera initiativ parallellt i en komplex miljö med många beroenden.
   

  

****Om dig****
 Vi söker dig som trivs med att arbeta tillsammans med andra och skapar goda relationer på alla nivåer i organisationen. Du är målinriktad och drivs av resultat med en förmåga att ändra inriktning när målen förändras. Som ledare skapar du engagemang och delaktighet i teamen.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* akademisk utbildning inom data/it eller flerårig likvärdig arbetslivserfarenhet
* flerårig aktuell erfarenhet av att leda och motivera utvecklingsteam
* erfarenhet av arbete med e-hälsa och/eller från sektorn hälsa, vård och omsorg
* aktuell erfarenhet av agilt arbetssätt, exempelvis av ramverket SAFe
* erfarenhet av webbutveckling
* väl förtrogen med modern frontend-arkitektur och verktyg inom frontend-utveckling
* goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift.


****Vad erbjuder vi?****
 E-hälsomyndigheten är en myndighet i tillväxt och vi driver utvecklingen av nationell digital infrastruktur inom hälsa, vård och omsorg. Vi skapar förutsättningar för digitala tjänster och lösningar för både privatpersoner och professioner inom hälso- och sjukvård, apotek och socialtjänst. Vi arbetar för att hälsodata ska bli tillgängliga i hela vårdkedjan.
   

  

 Vi är cirka 600 medarbetare i Kalmar och Stockholm. Hos oss finns möjlighet att göra skillnad i en innovativ miljö med trevliga och kompetenta arbetskamrater. Alla medarbetare har förtroendearbetstid och kan arbeta delvis på distans. Läs mer om E-hälsomyndigheten som arbetsplats: Jobba hos oss.
   

  

****Är du intresserad?****
 Frågor angående tjänsten besvaras av:
   

  

 Tf Enhetschef Ulrika Engebladh på 010-458 62 61.
   

  

 Frågor angående rekryteringsprocessen besvaras av:
   

  

 HR-specialist Izabella Onstrand på ext.izabella.onstrand@ehalsomyndigheten.se .
   

  

 Välkommen att skicka in din ansökan och cv via vårt rekryteringsverktyg senast den
 **13 april 2026** 
 . Ladda gärna upp examensbevis, betyg och intyg som är relevanta för tjänsten i samband med din ansökan.
   

  

 Urvalsfrågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Att besvara urvalsfrågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  

 Anställningen är tillsvidare med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde snarast eller enligt överenskommelse. Placeringsort för anställningen är Kalmar eller Stockholm. Arbetet kan innebära tjänsteresor, främst mellan Kalmar och Stockholm.
   

  

 En anställning hos oss kan innebära placering i säkerhetsklass. Därför kan vi komma att behöva genomföra en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585). För en del arbetsuppgifter i säkerhetsklass krävs svenskt medborgarskap.
   

  

 Om du har beslut om skyddade personuppgifter, kontakta den HR-specialist som finns namngiven i annonsen.
   

  

 Läs mer om oss på www.ehalsomyndigheten.se .
   

  

 Rekryteringen hanteras av E-hälsomyndighetens HR-enhet och vi undanber oss säljsamtal från rekryteringsföretag och annonssäljare.

title: ServiceNow GRC konsult
description:
*Är du en skicklig och ambitiös konsult med erfarenhet av risk- och säkerhetshantering? Har du en passion för teknik och vill hjälpa till att leverera innovativa lösningar via ServiceNow-plattformen? Då vill vi att du ska bli en del av teamet!*
 \_ \_ \_ \_
   

  

**Om oss**
 Risk & Compliance Consulting (RCC) på KPMG Advisory är ett mångsidigt team på cirka 60 kollegor med ämnes expertis inom risktransformation, regelefterlevnad, forensiska utredningar och hantering av bedrägeririsker, intern kontroll, riskhantering, internrevision och hållbarhet. Vi arbetar med ett brett spektrum av riskrådgivningstjänster och våra medarbetare har mycket olika bakgrunder, inklusive ekonomi, juridik, teknik, företagsekonomi och statsvetenskap.
   

  

 Vår mångfald i både människor och kompetenser gör oss till en ledande rådgivare på marknaden. Vi arbetar med högpresterande kunder inom alla sektorer, inklusive privat sektor, offentlig sektor och finansiella tjänster. En viktig del av vårt arbete är digitalisering och integrering av ny teknik för att förändra riskhanterings- och efterlevnadsprocesser för våra kunder. Vi ger råd till våra kunder i deras transformationsresor och främjar digitala, innovativa och hållbara lösningar på våra kunders affärsutmaningar.
   

  

 Vi hjälper våra kunder med rådgivning och implementering av den ledande teknikplattformen ServiceNow, för digitalisering och transformation inom våra discipliner. Våra verksamhetsområden inkluderar riskhantering, säkerhet, supply chain, HR, portföljhantering, leverantörsstyrning och utveckling av kundspecifika lösningar.
   

  

 KPMGs ServiceNow satsning är en global framgångssaga och vårt fokus på professionell expertis och domänexpertis har gjort oss till en föredragen partner, både för ServiceNow och för våra kunder. Våra insatser har uppmärksammats globalt genom att bland annat ha utsetts till ServiceNow Global Transformation Partner of the Year 2023.
   

  

 Vi finns representerade vid KPMGs kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg och Malmö.
   

  

**Din roll**
 Vi söker dig som har, eller vill bygga, kompetens inom riskhantering, cybersäkerhet, regelefterlevnad, bolagsstyrning samt krisberedskap och integritet – ur ett teknik- och verktygsstödsperspektiv. Det finns mycket utrymme att växa professionellt och personligt i denna position!
   

  

 Som ServiceNow GRC konsult kommer du att;
   

  

* Spela en nyckelroll i att hjälpa våra kunder att stärka sin GRC-funktion (Governance, Risk, and Compliance) med hjälp av ServiceNow plattformen
* Vara involverad i olika kundengagemang inom olika branscher
* Vägleda och hjälpa kunder med råd om implementering och användning av ServiceNow inom primärt Governance Risk and Compliance
* Bidra till att utforma och anpassa lösningar som adresserar kundens behov inom risk- och säkerhetshantering, regelefterlevnad, leverantörsrisk, nödberedskap och integritet
* Samarbeta med multidisciplinära team för att säkerställa leveranser av hög kvalitet
* Vara en drivande kraft för bästa praxis och ständiga förbättringar
* Aktivt delta i utvecklingen av tjänsteområdet inom ServiceNow med innovativa lösningar på komplexa problem, och inte minst hjälpa till att bygga ett starkt cyber- och GRC-community i hela Norden och EMA


 ,
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* Masterexamen inom teknik, ekonomi, IT-säkerhet, samhällssäkerhet och riskhantering eller motsvarande
* 2-6 års erfarenhet inom relevanta områden som risk- och säkerhetshantering, IT-styrning eller compliance
* Certifiering i ServiceNow
* Praktisk erfarenhet av GRC-verktyg, särskilt ServiceNow
* God teknisk förståelse och intresse för hur teknik kan stödja affärsprocesser
* God kommunikationsförmåga, både på svenska och engelska
* Svenskt medborgarskap


**Vill du göra skillnad med oss?**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan, om du har några frågor om tjänsten eller rekryteringsprocessen, vänligen kontakta Marie-Louise Bååth, marie-louise.baath@kpmg.se
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot din ansökan och för nya kollegor att haka på vår resa!**
 I den här rekryteringen har vi följande steg;
   

  

* Verksamhetsintervju
* Personlighet- och logisk test med personlighetsintervju
* Slutintervju
* Referenser
* Bakgrundskontroll

title: Fintech Co-Founder / CCO (100 % remote) (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking to hire ambitious entrepreneurs to start and scale their own startups.
 


  


 We are serial entrepreneurs, for example Paul Müller (founder Adjust, €1.2B exit) and Petter Made (founder SumUp, €8B) who are eager to support outlier personalities and serial entrepreneurs to build €1B+ companies.
 


  


 Our offer:
 


  

  
* A salary while you build your startup as you will directly be employed by us. Alternatively, you can opt for up to
 **€500k** 
 in funding.
  
* **1:1 sparring with unicorn founders** 
 on a weekly basis
  
* **Community** 
 : Access to the top 0.1% of founders, peers and investors
  
* **Team building** 
 : Hiring top notch talent supported through our network (over 50,000 professionals)
  
* **Distribution** 
 : Support in reaching product-market-fit and building up a sales force / marketing machine
  
* **Funding support** 
 for securing a multi-million euro funding round within 12 months (on average, EWOR Fellows raise > €2M after our Grand Pitch)
  


  


 One of our fellows set a record for Europe’s largest pre-seed round by a first-time founder, securing a €12M pre-seed investment.
 


  

 Tasks
   

  
* You will own, build, and run your startup in fields such as Fintech
  
* You will embark on an extensive personal development journey crafted by unicorn founders and follow a fully customised programme enhancing your goal, time, and energy management
  
* You will receive support in hiring through our network to over 50,000 professionals and advice as well as best practices from serial entrepreneurs
  
* You will receive intensive coaching to make your startup ready to raise millions in funding
  
* You will iterate your product with us until having reached product-market-fit and receive support in building up a sales force or creating a marketing engine respectively
  


  

 Requirements
   

  
* You are based in Europe or the Americas or open to relocate
  
* You are willing to take full responsibility for your own startup and scale it to €100M+ in revenues
  
* You have excellent communication skills in the English language
  


  


 Join us and build a €1B+ company with us!

title: Executive Exchange Project Manager
description:
Mentimeter is an engagement tool with a clear goal in mind. To turn presentations into conversations. Through real-time interactivity and clear visualizations, we get people to participate, engage and become more productive. Transforming all those passive meetings, airless classrooms and drawn out trainings into valuable and memorable moments.
   

  

 We truly believe that you achieve the best results by doing things together. And that successful leaders need to adopt a curious and collaborative mindset in order to get there. So with you at Mentimeter, you’ll be a big part of the ambition to help over 1 billion people listen, learn and work better together.
   

  

 Are you someone who makes complex things look effortless? Who cares just as much about the strategy behind an executive dinner as you do about the place cards on the table? Who builds relationships that make cross-functional work actually work?
   

  

 If you light up at the idea of orchestrating premium experiences for senior leaders at the world’s most influential companies — and you’re excited about building something new from the ground up — do keep reading.
   

  

**About Mentimeter**
 Mentimeter is an engagement platform with a clear purpose: to turn presentations into conversations. Through real-time interactivity and clear visualizations, we help people participate, engage, and become more productive — transforming passive meetings, airless classrooms, and drawn-out trainings into valuable, memorable moments.
   

  

 With over 300 million people reached worldwide, we’re now deepening our impact with the organizations that matter most. Our Executive Engagement function is a strategic bet at the heart of Mentimeter’s 2028 growth ambition: premium education and community experiences for senior leaders at our most strategic enterprise accounts.
   

  

 The role
   

  

 As Executive Engagement Project Manager, you’ll be the operational owner of our entire Executive Engagement function — spanning the Executive Academy (certification courses, masterclasses, executive onboarding) and the Executive Community (Curiosity Club dinners, Advisory Boards, Executive Getaway).
   

  

 You’ll turn strategic direction into flawless execution: owning the master calendar, managing stakeholder coordination, ensuring every touchpoint is premium, and building the systems that let us scale without losing the personal touch. You’ll work closely with the Director, our Learning Designers & Facilitators, Customer Success, and Brand teams.
   

  

 This is not a supporting role.
 **You own workstreams end-to-end, operate with high autonomy, and are directly accountable for the operational quality of everything we deliver to senior executives at our most important customers** 
 .
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

* Own the master calendar, production timeline, and logistics for all Executive Engagement programs and events
* Project manage Curiosity Club dinners, Advisory Boards, and the Executive Getaway from planning to follow-up
* Coordinate certification courses and masterclasses: enrollment, participant communications, scheduling, venue and tech setup, materials, certificates
* Build and maintain strong, energizing relationships with Customer Success and Sales — making it easy for them to engage their accounts in our programs
* Manage engagement data, CRM accuracy, and reporting dashboards
* Own the quality of every participant touchpoint: invitations, landing pages, emails, follow-ups, and event experiences
* Turn engagement data into actionable insights that help Sales, Marketing, and Leadership make better decisions.
* Capture executive insights from events and courses in ways that inform account strategy, product development, and enterprise messaging.
* Continuously improve operational playbooks as the function scales from pilot to platform


 Who we believe you are
   

  

 You’re a senior operational leader who combines sharp project management with genuine warmth and premium taste. You see the strategic picture and execute the details with equal confidence. You don’t just manage logistics — you care about the experience.
   

  

 You’ll thrive here if you…
   

  

* Have proven experience managing premium events, executive programs, or customer marketing in a B2B enterprise environment
* Have a track record of owning complex, multi-stakeholder initiatives end-to-end
* Are a natural relationship builder, especially with internal teams like Customer Success and Sales
* Have strong taste and quality instinct: you know what premium looks like and won’t settle for less
* Are highly organized and detail-obsessed, while keeping the big picture in view
* Communicate confidently in English (written and verbal) at a level suited for executive audiences
* Are comfortable building systems and processes from scratch in a fast-moving environment
* Are curious about how AI tools can help you work smarter and deliver more personalized experiences at scale
* Write with clarity and polish, whether it's an executive invitation, a post-event summary, or an account intelligence brief.


 Bonus points for…
   

  

* Background in community building or executive echange programs
* Experience with modern CRM systems and event platforms
* Ability to analyze engagement data and produce clear, actionable reports
* Swedish language proficiency


 Your impact
   

  

**Within Your First Year, You’ll Have**
* Delivered a full calendar of certification courses, masterclasses, executive dinners, and community events — all at a world-class standard
* Built the operational backbone that lets our executive exchange scale: playbooks, systems, feedback loops, and stakeholder rhythms
* Become the trusted operational partner for Customer Success, Sales, and Marketing across Executive Exchange
* Played a direct role in growing Mentimeter’s impact with the executives who shape how the world’s largest organizations communicate, lead, and learn


 Why Mentimeter
   

  

* Join a strategic initiative with direct C-level visibility and impact
* Work on a beloved product used by over 300 million people
* Profitable, fast-growing international scaleup with a strong culture
* Competitive compensation and benefits, including pension contributions
* A healthy perspective on work-life balance
* Access to leadership programs and continuous professional development


 This is a dynamic role in a fast-growing area of our business. As Executive Exchange scales, the role will evolve, and you’ll play a key role in defining its future.
   

  

 If you don’t tick every single box, apply anyway. We want someone who’s ready to build something meaningful with us.
   

  

**What Mentimeter Can Offer**
 At Mentimeter we can offer a diverse and inclusive work environment supported by smart and driven colleagues. We believe in continuous professional development for all of our colleagues and therefore offer access to a leadership program (including external personal coach) and relevant education to ensure that we continue to be state-of-the-art when it comes to innovating and building Mentimeter. Your place will be in a growing company with lots of career opportunities, working on a beloved product used by more than 300 million people. It’s not all about work though, we also offer a very healthy view on work-life balance.
   

  

 All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package, including pension contributions. Learn more about our benefits by visiting our Benefits & Perks page
   

  

**AI and Hiring at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter, we believe AI helps us work smarter - but it never replaces the human assessment, curiosity, and personal connection that define our culture and our hiring. We use AI as a sparring partner: to bounce ideas, bring new perspectives, support structure, and make our work more efficient. But the meaning, decisions, and interactions always come from people.
   

  

* AI does not screen or decide on candidates.
* There is no automated filtering, ranking, or decision-making in our recruitment process. Every application is reviewed by a person.
* Hiring teams may use AI to support their work - for example, to structure notes, prepare interview questions, or organize their thinking.


 AI strengthens our work, but it does not define it. At Mentimeter, we’re not building an AI-driven hiring process - we’re building a people-first culture, where technology helps us listen, learn, and grow together.
   

  

**Culture at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter we believe in giving everyone a voice - regardless of who you are. So we build a platform that does just that. Our platform is not only our product but also our organization. A platform where people feel safe, where differences are embraced, a place where you can have fun. We strongly encourage applicants who are people of color, LGBTQ+, women, people with disabilities, and/or formerly incarcerated people, and a college degree is not strictly required. In order to give everyone a voice, we need to be as diverse as our users.
   

  

 Learn more about our culture by visiting our Culture page.
   

  

 Review our Privacy Policy for more information.

title: Performance Marketing Manager
description:
At Qred, we’re building the bank for small businesses. Since launching 10 years ago, we’ve grown from startup to profitable fintech scale-up, now generating over 1 billion SEK in annual revenue and supporting 50,000+ entrepreneurs across Northern Europe. We combine smart technology, real data, and human judgment to make financing simple, fast, and fair. With bold growth plans and strong momentum across multiple markets, we’re now looking for a Performance Marketing Manager for the next phase of growth.
   

  

**About The Role**
 In this role, you will lead our digital acquisition strategy and mentor a team of specialists to drive high-quality growth across all markets. We are looking for a senior professional who can balance high-level strategic planning with a hands-on approach to execution. You will operate within our regulated Banking License environment, using attribution models through MMM to optimize our marketing spend. Your focus will be on scaling our reach while maintaining a disciplined approach to unit economics and sustainable growth.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead and mentor the performance marketing team to ensure professional growth and high output
* Develop and execute a multi-channel acquisition strategy across search, social, and display
* Oversee and optimize substantial marketing budgets to achieve ambitious growth targets
* Implement a structured testing and experimentation framework to improve conversion across the funnel
