title: People Technology Analyst | Workday | EMEA 12 Month Fixed Term Contract
description:
Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo).
   

  

 We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.
   

  

 You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.
   

  

 The Workday Analyst is responsible for the configuration and support of our Workday platform including: HCM, Absence, Global Benefits, Talent & Performance, Advanced Compensation, and Journeys.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Support system users, troubleshooting issues, and providing timely resolution, leveraging Workday Community/support to resolve complex escalation points. You will be the point person to answer questions and help enable teams.
* Build and maintain custom reports, tools and analytics to meet team needs. You will be well versed in the different reporting types (Advanced, Matrix, Transposed, etc), calculated fields, prompts, and filters.
* Lead Workday enhancement and optimization projects through completion.
* Configure and maintain Workday business processes including routing, approvals, notifications, and condition rules.
* Support Workday bi-annual releases by reviewing release notes, performing impact analysis, coordinating testing, and implementing relevant feature updates.
* Configure and maintain security roles and permissions to ensure data protection and privacy.
* Create Inbound EIB templates and mass loading data for recurring tasks and as needed.
* Create change management documentation and training to support cross functional teams on new features.


**What We’re Looking For**
* 1-2 years+ experience configuring and supporting Workday HCM (ideal candidates will have experience supporting several of these additional modules: Absence, Global Benefits, Talent & Performance, Advanced Compensation, and Journeys.).
* Experience in a high-growth startup environment with constant change as your companion.
* A passion for being organized, with incredibly strong project management skills. You will need to be detail oriented, love multi-tasking and have excellent follow through skills.
* A customer service, highly-approachable role ensuring that everyone, locally and internationally, views you as a “go to” person.
* Excellent communication in all channels (in person, online, in writing) and are able to form strong working relationships both in person and virtually.
* Strong analytical skills, with the ability to create custom reports, use complex spreadsheet formulas and analyze data in order to draw conclusions and make recommendations.
* You will be process oriented and enjoy creating process and structure where there may be ambiguity and be skilled at finding creative solutions to non-obvious problems.
* You will also be in the detail and happy to own your administrative tasks through to completion.


**Compensation & Rewards**
* In the Sweden, the annual compensation range for this role is 480,000 - 576,000 SEK. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed in the interview process.
* Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.


**Why You’ll Thrive At Grafana Labs**
* 100% Remote, Global Culture - As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* Scaling Organization – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* Transparent Communication – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* Innovation-Driven – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* Open Source Roots – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* Empowered Teams – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* Career Growth Pathways – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* Approachable Leadership – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* Passionate People – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* In-Person onboarding - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* Balance is Key - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. \*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 
 We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.
   

  

*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*
*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our privacy policy.*

title: Senior Engineer Linux Container
description:
Vill du hjälpa våra kunder att lyckas med sin utveckling och vara en central del inom vår leverans för att stödja våra kunders resa. Då vill jag gärna lära känna dig! Jag heter Petra Peric och ansvarar för vårt fantastiska Leveransteam inom Managed Services, en central enhet som ansvarar för att levererar Hybrid & Cloud tjänster inom Telia Cygate. Vi växer inom området och ser en stor tillväxt inom AI området
   

  

 Vi söker en erfaren och kunnig Senior Engineer inom container-teknologier för att leda och utveckla Cygates container-baserade lösningar. Du kommer att spela en nyckelroll i att designa, implementera och underhålla våra container-infrastrukturer, samt att stödja utvecklingsteamet i att optimera applikationsleverans och drift.
   

  

**Vad du kommer att göra i rollen:**
* Designa och implementera Cygate Kubernetes as a service plattform.
* Utveckla och underhålla CI/CD-pipelines för att säkerställa effektiv och säker leverans av applikationer.
* Övervaka och optimera prestanda för containeriserade applikationer och infrastrukturer.
* Samarbeta med utvecklingsteam för att integrera container-lösningar i befintliga system och arbetsflöden.
* Felsöka och lösa problem relaterade till container-teknologier och molnplattformar.
* Hålla sig uppdaterad med de senaste trenderna och bästa praxis inom container-teknologier.
* Mentor och utbilda juniora tekniker och utvecklare inom container-teknologier.


**För att lyckas i rollen:**
 Som personer har du ett genuint intresse av IT och utveckling, där du använder din omvärldskunskap för att hjälpa våra kunder.
   

  

 Din personlighet:
   

  

* Du påverkar din omgivning och förhåller dig konstruktiv vid misslyckanden
* Självständig och proaktiv med förmåga att ta initiativ och driva projekt framåt.
* Teamorienterad med god samarbetsförmåga.
* Flexibel och anpassningsbar i en dynamisk arbetsmiljö.


 Din erfarenhet:
   

  

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av att arbeta med container-teknologier som Kubernetes och Docker.
* Djup förståelse för CI/CD-processer och verktyg som Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD eller liknande.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med molnplattformar som AWS, Azure eller Google Cloud.
* Stark kunskap i skriptning och automatisering med Bash, Python, Go eller liknande språk.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i agila utvecklingsmiljöer.
* Utmärkta problemlösnings- och felsökningsförmågor.
* God kommunikationsförmåga och erfarenhet av att leda och utbilda team


 Meriterande:
   

  

* Certifieringar som Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA), Docker Certified Associate (DCA) eller liknande.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med säkerhet och efterlevnad i container-miljöer.
* Kunskap om nätverksarkitektur och säkerhet i containeriserade miljöer.


**Varför Telia Cygate?**
 På Telia Cygate är vi inte bara experter på nätverk, säkerhet och olika slags moln – vi är också ett gäng som tycker att det ska vara kul att gå till jobbet! Som en del av Telia Company har vi styrkan att skapa verklig påverkan i stor skala, bidra till samhällsnytta och hjälpa våra kunder att navigera i digitaliseringens värld. Vi gör det alltid med värme, omtanke och ett leende. Här är det idéerna och våra olika perspektiv som gör oss starka, och tillsammans ser vi till att teknikens värld blir en plats där alla trivs – och där du hör hemma.
   

  

 Hos oss är din utveckling viktig. Vi uppmuntrar till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och ser till att just du och dina intressen är i fokus. Vi vet att det är människorna som utgör vårt företag, och därför värdesätter vi glädje, kreativitet och olika perspektiv i allt vi gör.
   

  

 Välkommen att växa tillsammans med oss, där vi gör teknik mänsklig och skapar verklig påverkan
 **!**
**Telia Cygate är stolta över att vara certifierade som Great Place to Work!**
 Hos oss står människor i centrum – här får du utvecklas, utmanas och trivas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor. Vi bygger en kultur där trygghet, gemenskap och möjligheter går hand i hand. Vill du vara med på resan? Välkommen till en arbetsplats som verkligen gör skäl för namnet.
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder**
 När du börjar hos oss får du ett omfattande förmånspaket anpassat efter din lokala marknad, möjlighet till hybridarbete och mer. Du har också chans att få bonus baserat på din prestation och Telias resultat.
   

  

**Låter det intressant?**
 Ta chansen och bli en del av vårt härliga team! Tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan redan idag – vi ser fram emot att höra från dig.
   

  

 Placeringsort: Solna, Malmö, Karlstad
   

  

 Har du frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta mig gärna på petra.peric@cygate.se Sista ansökningsdag är 2026-04-15, men vi rekryterar löpande, så vänta inte för länge!
   

  

 I samband med våra rekryteringar undanber vi oss kontakter från rekryteringsföretag och andra annonsörer.
   

  

 Bakgrundskontroll är en del i våra rekryteringsprocesser.
   

  

**Lika möjligheter för alla**
 På Telia värderar vi kompetens och utvecklingspotential. Vi främjar mångfald och ser till att varje individs behov tillgodoses, oavsett funktionsvariation, kön, ålder, nationalitet, sexuell läggning eller social bakgrund. Tillsammans skapar vi en inkluderande arbetsmiljö där din unikhet är vår styrka.
   

  

**Välkommen till Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Senior Key Account Manager – Enterprise Accounts
description:
**Do you enjoy uncovering what enterprise customers really need and turning complex challenges into solutions that work in practice?**
 In this role, you will work strategically with accounts to understand their network environments, identify opportunities for modernization, and deliver solutions that create long-term value.
   

  

**If you have the following, this job is for you:**
* 10+ years of experience in enterprise B2B sales within technology, telecom, networking or managed services
* Proven experience owning and growing large, complex enterprise accounts end-to-end. Comfortable collaborating with sales engineers/specialist, delivery, procurement, legal etc. to shape solutions and win strategic deals.
* Experience selling networking, infrastructure or managed solutions such as SD-WAN, Managed LAN, security or cloud connectivity. Comfortable with high level network architecture.
* A consultative sales approach and the ability to engage multiple stakeholders in complex organizations
* A bachelor’s or master’s degree in business, engineering or similar, or equivalent experience


**About The Role And The Team**
 As part of our Enterprise Accounts team, you will work with some of GlobalConnect’s most important enterprise customers. Your focus is to help them modernize their network environments by positioning our products and services within SD-WAN, Managed LAN and security services and cloud connectivity.
   

  

 You will engage with stakeholders across the customer organization, including CIOs, infrastructure leaders, network architects and procurement. Your role is to understand their strategic priorities and translate technological capabilities into clear commercial value for customers.
   

  

 Internally, you will work closely with solution specialists, pre-sales engineers and service teams to shape opportunities and deliver successful outcomes for the customer. This means you will lead and coordinate virtual account teams, ensuring structure, clear deal strategies and alignment along the way.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities and what you will do during a typical week:**
* Work strategically to develop and execute account plans for assigned enterprise customers
* Build relationships across the customer buying group, from CIO to network architects. This means establishing us as a trusted advisor rather than a transactional supplier to them.
* Identify and drive opportunities related to network transformation and our SmartConnect solutions
* Lead complex enterprise sales opportunities from qualification to closing directly with our customers. This includes coordinating internal teams to shape solutions and win strategic deals.
* Maintain a strong pipeline and deliver reliable forecasts


**Who We Are Looking For**
 In a nutshell, we are looking for a senior enterprise seller who thrives in complex environments and enjoys building long-term, strategic partnerships directly with customers. You are comfortable navigating large organizations, engaging both technical and business stakeholders, and translating technology into clear business value. You combine strategic thinking with a structured approach to sales execution and enjoy collaborating across teams to win complex deals.
   

  

 Does this sound like you? If so, we would love to hear from you!
   

  

**Why join GlobalConnect?**
 GlobalConnect builds and operates critical digital infrastructure across the Nordics and northern Germany. Our network connects businesses, public services and communities, and reliability is essential for society to function. By joining us, you will work with customers that rely on secure and modern connectivity and help them transform their network environments.
   

  

 No need for a personal letter – just send us your CV or LinkedIn profile.
   

  

 Join us and be part of the transformation in one of Northern Europe’s most important digital infrastructure companies. Apply today!
   

  

**About Us**
 GlobalConnect is one of the leading connectivity providers in Northern Europe. We’re 2000 passionate and talented individuals who want to make a difference, turning our customers’ visions into reality through connectivity. Our goal is to create the best possible conditions for engaged employees, a place where you can develop and grow, and create unforgettable memories and enjoyable experiences.
   

  

 We have helped develop and digitize societies across the Nordics for more than two decades. Our purpose is what drives us to continue - turning visions into reality by empowering society with connectivity.

title: Technical Sales Executive Scandinavia
description:
Join Nordcloud and be part of the European cloud revolution. We supercharge our customers to innovate in hyperscaler cloud, enabling seamless migration, advanced security, and data-driven success. This role focuses on winning new clients in the Enterprise and Corporate business sectors and develop some of our current customers in parallel. As a trusted advisor, you will develop strong relationships with C-level executives and
   

  

 stakeholders, ensuring Nordcloud becomes their go-to partner for cloud services.
   

  

**Currently, we are looking for a** 
**Technical Sales Executive – Scandinavia (Norway, Sweden, Denmark)**
 As a Technical Sales Executive at Nordcloud, you will be a driving force in our sales organisation, identifying client needs, designing cloud solutions, and managing the entire sales process. By delivering innovative cloud solutions, you will help clients increase operational efficiency and reduce costs, and ensuring that technology drives measurable business outcomes.
   

  

 Your technical acumen and consultative approach will empower you to understand complex client challenges, architect impactful solutions, and communicate the business benefits of cloud adoption to C-level and technical stakeholders.
   

  

 You will own your results, demonstrate a winner’s attitude, and collaborate closely with colleagues across Nordcloud and IBM Consulting to achieve your goals.
   

  

**Your** 
**key responsibilities:**
* Lead Technical Sales Engagements: Identify client needs and design tailored cloud solutions that deliver measurable business outcomes. Drive new business within existing client base as well as within new logo acquisitions leveraging your technical expertise, solution mindset and ability to link desired business value to technical solutions.
* Collaborate for Success: Work as part of larger teams—often led by IBM Consulting—integrating Nordcloud’s cloud solutions and value proposition into comprehensive, high-impact deals. Build strong relationships with internal teams, partners (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), and stakeholders to deliver best-in-class solutions.
* Create Business Value: Apply a solution-based sales approach to address complex customer challenges, always focusing on how technology can advance the client’s strategic objectives.
* Ownership for Results: Take full responsibility for meeting and exceeding sales targets in consultancy and service sales, with a focus on cloud infrastructure, modernization, managed services, and consulting portfolios.
* Drive and Winner’s Attitude: Approach every opportunity with energy, resilience, and a relentless drive to win. Celebrate successes and learn from setbacks, always striving for excellence.
* Solution Workshops & Discovery: Lead workshops and discovery sessions with client stakeholders to uncover pain points and co-create strategies that maximize the value of cloud adoption.
* Thought Leadership: Represent Nordcloud at industry events and in the media, showcasing your expertise and our leadership in cloud technology.


**What we are looking for:**
* Background: Coming from a technical background with several years of experience in roles such as IT-/Cloud Architect, Cloud Engineer, IT-/Cloud CTO, IT-/Cloud Solution Manager or similar. IT-/Cloud Solution Manager or similar.
* Experience: 7+ years in technical sales, solution sales, IT consulting, or cloud services, with a strong technical foundation and a proven track record of winning and growing new business.
* Solution Understanding: Knowledge of public cloud architectures (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), migration strategies, and cloud-native solutions. Ability to map technology capabilities to client business needs.
* Consultative Approach: Experience working directly with C-level stakeholders and senior IT executives, translating technical concepts into business value. With solution selling methodology you will craft tailored value propositions for complex cloud projects.
* Ownership & Drive: Demonstrated ability to take ownership for results, operate with a winner’s attitude, and thrive in high-growth, fast-paced environments.
* Collaboration: Proven ability to collaborate across teams and organizations, including cloud partners, to deliver integrated solutions.
* Communication: Excellent communication, presentation, and organizational skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences.
* Education: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent preferred.
* Languages: Fluent in English and at least one Scandinavian language.
* Bonus Points: Hands-on experience with cloud services offerings, tools, and processes. Certifications in AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud are highly valued.


**What we offer:**
* Flexible working hours and hybrid working model
* Laptop and equipment to enable your efficient work
* Local package such as extensive private health care and insurance, wellness benefits


 Please read our Recruitment Privacy Policy before applying.
 **All applicants must have the right to work in Sweden.**
**About Nordcloud**
 Nordcloud is a European leader in cloud implementation, application development, managed services and training. It’s a recognised cloud-native pioneer with a proven track record helping organisations leverage public cloud in a way that balances quick wins, immediate savings and sustainable value.
   

  

 Nordcloud is triple-certified across Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud Platform – with 10 European hubs, over 1,300 employees and has delivered over 1,000 successful cloud projects for companies ranging from midsize to large corporates.
   

  

 Our clients benefit from multi-cloud expertise that guides best practices, preempts pitfalls, provides essential technical support and steers teams through cultural change. From strategy planning to application management, we take our customers through the whole cloud journey to drive real business outcomes from cloud technology.
   

  

 Learn more at www.nordcloud.com
   

  

*Nordcloud values diversity and is dedicated to providing equal opportunities for all candidates and employees.*

title: Enterprise Account Executive
description:
**Oneflow är en snabbt växande tech scale-up som ligger i hjärtat av Stockholm. Vi har skapat en plattform som automatiserar hela kontraktsprocessen från början till slut, allt på ett ställe. Förvandla klumpiga, statiska kontrakt till kundorienterade, digitala kontrakt – precis som magi!** 




  





 Nu söker vi en Enterprise Account Executive som vill spela en nyckelroll i vår fortsatta expansion. Här får du chansen att arbeta med några av Nordens största och mest välkända bolag – och samtidigt vara del av en kultur där vi alltid är #inittogether.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




  





 Som Enterprise Account Executive blir du en avgörande del i Oneflows tillväxtresa. Du kommer att driva komplexa affärer med stora organisationer, ofta med flera beslutsfattare och långa säljcykler. Rollen kräver att du kan navigera i strategiska processer, skapa starka relationer på C-level och positionera Oneflow som en affärskritisk lösning. Hos oss trivs du om du:
 



  




* vill arbeta med att etablera och växa relationer hos större organisationer i Norden och internationellt
* har en strategisk approach till försäljning och är nyfiken på att utveckla din förmåga att driva komplexa affärer, även om du inte har mångårig erfarenhet
* tycker om att påverka både affär och kultur i ett snabbväxande bolag



  





**Primära arbetsuppgifter** 




  





 I rollen förväntas du:
 



  




* arbeta strategiskt med account planning för ett urval target accounts
* driva hela säljcykeln från prospektering till avtalssignering
* bygga och vårda relationer med beslutsfattare på olika nivåer, och utveckla din erfarenhet av C-level kontakter
* leda och koordinera interna resurser i affärerna (marketing, pre-sales, product, legal, partner m.fl.)
* bidra med best practices till säljteamet och hjälpa dina kollegor att lyckas



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




  





 Hos Oneflow får du:
 



  




* en plats i en snabbväxande tech scale-up med en fantastisk företagskultur (vår eNPS ligger över branschsnittet)
* att arbeta i ett team med tydliga mål och en gemensam vision
* årligt friskvårdsbidrag på 5 000 SEK
* ett välutrustat kontor med sociala ytor, snacks och dryck
* veckovisa och månatliga sociala aktiviteter
* försäkringar och pensionsplan
* inspirerande kollegor från hela världen
* en öppen, inkluderande och snabb miljö där du kan forma din egen karriärväg
* möjlighet att växa i rollen och utveckla dina färdigheter inom enterprise-försäljning, även om du inte har all erfarenhet än



  





**Om dig** 




  





 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi gärna att du har:
 



  




* erfarenhet eller starka resultat inom B2B-försäljning, och intresse av att växa inom enterprise-segmentet
* bekväm med att interagera med beslutsfattare och vill utveckla din förmåga att påverka på hög nivå
* förmåga att skapa struktur och långsiktiga planer för target accounts, med stöd från teamet
* flytande svenska och engelska – fler språk är meriterande
* en ”trusted advisor”-attityd och passion för att förstå kundens affär



  





 Relevant högre utbildning är meriterande, men erfarenhet och resultat väger tyngre.
 



  





**Känns detta som dig?** 




  





 Ansök genom att skicka in ditt CV och ett personligt brev på engelska där du förklarar varför rollen är intressant för dig och varför du skulle passa bra för den. För denna tjänst krävs det kunskaper i både svenska och engelska, men vårt rekryteringsteam talar engelska.
 



  





**Vi återkommer till dig så snart som möjligt!** 




  





 Vi värdesätter jämställdhet och mångfald och strävar efter ett team som speglar dagens samhälle. Vi är en mångfaldig arbetsplats med 180 personer från 34 olika nationaliteter, och vi tror att vår olikhet, både i bakgrund och erfarenheter, är en styrka för oss.
 



  





 Besök gärna vår hemsida för mer information om vår produkt. Besök vår blogg för mer information om vår kultur och dina framtida kollegor 💜
 



  





 En sak innan du ansöker!
 



 Vi vill se den äkta dig – inte AI-dig. Tänk inte för mycket, det viktigaste är dina egna ord och vem du är. Skriv från hjärtat. 💫

title: Technical Account Manager till CN Rood
description:
*Är du en målinriktad och relationsbyggande Account Manager som vill arbeta med banbrytande teknik och innovativa lösningar? Vill du vara en nyckelspelare i ett internationellt företag som ligger i framkant inom test- och mätutrustning? Hos CN Rood får du möjlighet att göra verklig skillnad för kunder inom några av de mest avancerade och spännande industrierna i Europa.* 




  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Vill du vara en del av ett ledande företag inom tekniska lösningar och innovation? CN Rood har i över 85 år varit specialister på test- och mätutrustning och arbetar med några av de mest avancerade företagen och forskningsinstitutionerna i Europa. CN Rood är stolta över deras djupa branschexpertis och förmåga att leverera skräddarsydda lösningar till kunder inom allt från flyg- och bilindustrin till forskning och utbildning.
 



  





 Med huvudkontor i Nederländerna och Belgien, och verksamhet över hela Norra Europa finns möjligheten att arbeta i en internationell och dynamisk miljö där innovation och kundnöjdhet står i fokus.
 



  





 Som Account Manager hos CN Rood kommer du att ansvara för att utveckla och stärka kundrelationerna i Sverige. Du kommer att utgå från Stockholm (eller annan valfri ort) och arbeta nära kunder inom sektorer som forskning, utbildning, och industrier med högteknologiska krav.
 



  





**Dina huvuduppgifter kommer att vara:** 



* Bygga och underhålla långsiktiga relationer med både befintliga och nya kunder
* Identifiera och utveckla nya affärsmöjligheter genom att förstå kundernas tekniska behov
* Presentera och sälja CN Roods breda portfölj av produkter och tjänster
* Samarbeta med tekniska experter och supportteam för att säkerställa att kunderna får rätt lösningar



  





**Du erbjuds:** 



* En flexibel och spännande roll i ett framstående företag med innovativa produkter
* Möjligheten att arbeta med marknadsledande lösningar inom test- och mätutrustning
* Ett engagerat och kunnigt team samt möjligheten att utvecklas i en internationell miljö
* Konkurrenskraftiga villkor och goda utvecklingsmöjligheter



  





 Tjänsten innebär en hög grad av flexibilitet – då du kommer utgå hemifrån, alternativt från ett kontorshotell och veckorna kommer innebära en del resande för att träffa befintliga och potentiella nya kunder.
 



  





**Vi söker dig som** 



* Har flerårig erfarenhet av B2B-försäljning, med fördel inom teknisk försäljning
* Är självständig, lösningsorienterad och trivs med att bygga förtroende och relationer
* Har stark kommunikativ förmåga på både svenska och engelska då båda språken används i det dagliga arbetet
* Har möjlighet att resa inom Sverige för kundmöten
* Innehar B-körkort



  





 För att lyckas som Account Manager hos CN Rood behöver du vara en person med starkt affärssinne och förmågan att bygga långsiktiga relationer. Du är självgående och driven, med en naturlig förmåga att förstå kunders behov och erbjuda skräddarsydda lösningar. Dessutom trivs du i en dynamisk, internationell miljö och har lätt för att kommunicera och samarbeta med både kunder och kollegor. Flexibilitet och en vilja att utvecklas är också viktigt för att hålla sig uppdaterad inom den tekniska utvecklingen och kundernas föränderliga behov.
 



  





 Låter detta som du? Eftersom rekryterande chef sitter i Belgien ber vi dig
 **skicka in ditt CV och eventuella personliga brev på engelska** 
 så snart du kan - vi arbetar med löpande urval!
 



  





**Vår rekryteringsprocess** 




 Denna rekryteringsprocess hanteras av Academic Work och vår kunds önskemål är att alla frågor rörande tjänsten skickas till Academic Work.
 



  





 Vi tillämpar löpande urval och kommer plocka ner annonsen när tillräckligt många kandidater har nått slutskedet i rekryteringsprocessen. Rekryteringsprocessen innehåller två urvalstest: ett personlighetstest och ett test i kognitiv förmåga. Testerna är ett verktyg för att kunna hitta den kandidat med högst potential för tjänsten samt främja jämlikhet, mångfald och en rättvis rekryteringsprocess.
 



  





**CN Rood Nordics AB** 




 Läs mer om CN Rood här!

title: German speaking Go-to-Market Lead for DACH area
description:
Tendium is looking for a German speaking GTM (Go-to-Market) Lead for DACH area
   

  

 Tendium is redefining how companies win public tenders.
   

  

 We are a fast-growing AI company helping organizations across Europe identify, qualify, and win high-value government contracts, turning a complex, hard to navigate process into a scalable, data-driven growth engine.
   

  

 Since 2018, we’ve built an AI-native platform powered by a unique data advantage, advanced automation, and agentic AI. Today, a rapidly growing customer base relies on Tendium to increase win rates and unlock predictable revenue from the public sector.
   

  

 Now, we’re entering our next phase: scaling aggressively in Germany and the DACH area, one of the largest and most competitive public procurement markets in Europe.
   

  

 This is where you come in.
   

  

 You won’t be joining an existing setup, you’ll be building it. As one of the first go-to-market hires in Germany, you will play a critical role in shaping our positioning, driving demand, and establishing Tendium as a category leader in the market.
   

  

 This is a rare opportunity to take ownership from day one, work directly with leadership, and define how an AI company wins in the DACH area.
   

  

 If you’re motivated by building from zero, moving fast, and making a measurable impact, we want to hear from you.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Launch GTM Strategy and the plan for how the product will be rolled out in DACH. Work closely with the commercial data team to identify entry points, messaging and what opportunities there are and continuously verify hypotheses by talking directly to customers and pilots.
* Build and maintain sustainable relationships with customers, industry experts, partners and key decision-makers across the public procurement sphere.
* Represent Tendium at trade fairs, conferences, and industry events, serving as an ambassador for our mission and solutions.
* Act as the "glue" and collaborate closely with the product teams, sales, customer success and the creative team in marketing to incorporate market feedback and continuously enhance the customer experience and guide product and marketing priorities
* Work with product teams to ensure the pricing and packaging model matches the customer's willingness to pay and market expectations.
* Utilize digital tools and CRM systems to analyze launch performance and key metrics such as lead conversion rates and CAC, continuously refining the strategy based on data and market feedback.
* Stay up to date on trends in public procurement, AI, and B2B SaaS, especially in the German speaking markets.


 What You Bring
   

  

* You have at least 6+ years of experience from similar roles.
* Native German, with excellent English communication skills.
* Experience with - or a solid understanding of - B2B SaaS environments.
* A commercial background within marketing, sales, or a related revenue-focused role.


 You will stand out if you have
   

  

* Good knowledge of the public procurement system in DACH & Europe.
* A completed degree in business administration or comparable education.


 Location
   

  

 Germany or Austria, with frequent trips to our Stockholm HQ. Expect to travel as part of building and scaling our presence in the DACH region.
   

  

 Application
   

  

 We look forward to your application. We recruit on an ongoing basis, so apply as soon as possible. If you want to know more about our culture and what you can expect when working at Tendium you can read more about it here. Please find additional information on our recruitment process here.
   

  

  

  

 At Tendium we’re using data to transform public procurement, giving our clients better access to public tenders and helping governments to curb waste and enhance transparency.
   

  

 For more information contact career@tendium.com

title: Senior Geotechnical Engineer
description:
locations
Garpenberg
time type
Full time
posted on
Posted Today
time left to apply
End Date: April 20, 2026 (30 days left to apply)
job requisition id
JOB\_014763
Boliden is a high-tech metals company with its own mines and smelters that work long-term to guarantee society's access to base and precious metals. For a century, our work has been part of the value chains that have shaped modern society. At Boliden, we know that the metals we mine and make available will continue to play a crucial role in the future – what matters is how we produce them. Become a part of us and drive change for generations to come.  

Your opportunity  

As a Senior Geotechnical Engineer in Garpenberg, you will have a role in ensuring safe and efficient mining operations at the Garpenberg Mine. This position is based in Garpenberg mine. You will be part of the long-term technical services team which is working on the mid- to long-term planning and the expansion of Garpenberg operations regarding both spatial extension of mining footprint and ore tonnage production increase. This requires a seasoned senior geotechnical engineer to oversee, assess and recommend design inputs, mining methods and sequence, impact on infrastructure and ground support designs.
Who you will work with
You will be part of a dedicated engineering team within the Long-term planning section within the Garpenberg Mine organization. You will work together with our geotechnical team of 6 geotechnical engineers and technicians, collaborating closely short-term mine planning, geology departments, production technology specialists and other technical service departments at the Garpenberg mine.
Your work will also involve interaction with consultants and other technical experts across Boliden’s operations. The Geotechnical network in the Boliden Mines is geographically distributed, but you will have regular opportunities for knowledge sharing and joint problem-solving in cross-functional projects. The geotechnical department at the Boliden Mines Staff is composed of numerous geotechnical engineers, seniors and specialists from various nationalities which instills a unique, welcoming culture that caters for a thriving environment.
What you will do* Work with our Mine planning engineers within Long-term planning and provide geotechnical input into LOMP designs and sequences as well as to our mid-range planning horizon
* Conduct geotechnical risk assessment of LOMP and Budget plans including stope dimensions, mining sequence, infrastructure placements and ground support designs
* Taking lead on updating, calibrating and validating numerical models at depth in Garpenberg in close collaboration with the local geotechnical team
* Revise and update the Seismic Risk Management Plan and Ground Control Management Plan, specifically at depth
* Work closely together with exploration and mine geology to develop a geotechnical block model and routines to maintain it
* Collaborate closely with mine planning, production teams, and external consultants
* Participate in R&D projects and contribute to improving rock mechanics processes within the department and at site
* Provide technical advice and facilitate cross-functional cooperation within the organization

What you bring
If this opportunity excites you and you feel ready to take on this role, we welcome your application. We believe you have/are:
Education:* Bachelor’s or MSc in Mining Engineering, Rock Mechanics, Civil Engineering with Specialism in Mining, or Geotechnical Engineering

Experience:* 10+ years in hard rock underground mining, preferably base metals.
* Operational experience in deep mining preferred.
* Proven track record of strategy and long-term and/or budget involvement for mine planning and geotechnical engineering
* Solid knowledge of rock mechanics, structural geology, seismicity, hydrogeology and backfill.

Skills:* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, ability to explain complex concepts clearly and proficiency in relevant software.
* Comfortable working individually and in teams closely with others, discussing technical topics with both engineers and non-engineers, and contributing to joint decisions in a team environment.
* Advanced numerical modelling experience using the ITASCA suite.
* Experience with seismic monitoring using the IMS suite and mXrap.
* Experience with deep, seismically active underground sublevel stoping mines.
* Strong computer skills, including experience with CAD software, preferably Deswik and other technical applications.
* Ability to write technical reports and communicate results to stakeholders.

Languages:* Proficiency in English and Swedish, or willingness and ability to learn Swedish quickly

Driver’s License:* Valid B-class license

It’s an advantage if you have experience in project work, facilitating collaboration, and working in dynamic environments with changing priorities.
Why work with us
At Boliden, we believe in promoting a workplace where care, courage, and responsibility are central to everything we do. We offer a workplace where we believe in collaboration and where what you contribute will have a direct impact on future generations. We are a company made up of responsible and creative people all working towards the same vision; to become the most sustainable and respected metal supplier in the world.
Apply today to be part of something truly meaningful!
At Boliden, diversity and inclusion are drivers of innovation. We know that different perspectives and experiences strengthen us and help us stay at the forefront of an important and exciting industry. Therefore, we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and viewpoints. Together, we have built a workplace where everyone can feel safe and inspired to reach their full potential.
Want to know more about the position? Contact hiring manager Henrik Lindvall at Henrik.Lindvall@boliden.com.
Questions about the application are answered by Talent Acquisition Partner Helen Eklid at helen.eklid@ext.boliden.com.
For union information contact Kent Hedin, Ledarna, 0225-369 50, Jacob Wallén, Unionen, 070-305 03 82, Morvan Derrien, SACO, 070- 209 05 63.  

Submit your application by: Sunday 19 April 2026  

Please submit your application to us as soon as possible, selection may take place on an ongoing basis. As part of Boliden’s commitment to quality recruitment and systematic safety efforts, background and health checks are included in our recruitment processes. *If you are a representative of a recruiting agency, please refrain from contacting us**regarding**this advertisement. We appreciate your understanding.*
-
Important! If you are a current employee within Boliden you shouldn't complete the application at this site, please log on to your Workday account

title: Design Engineer, Process Simulation
description:
**Drive the Future of Industrial Simulation as a Simulation Design Engineer**
=============================================================================

Are you passionate about advanced process simulation, digital twins, and helping industries transform with cutting edge technology? Join us as a Simulation Design Engineer and step into a role where you design, model and innovate digital solutions that support operators, boost industrial performance and shape the factories of tomorrow.


You will work hands-on with simulation models, analytical tools and software functions that support primarily p ulp, paper and energy but also other process industries. Your work directly contributes to smarter and more connected production environments.


**Your responsibilities**
-------------------------

* You will create and refine process models for advanced simulations used in operator training, system testing and predictive support.
* You will program analytical functions and contribute to digital twin development in our product development projects.
* You will collaborate closely with teams across Valmet and engage with customers globally to ensure high value and accurate simulation solutions.
* You will support the evolution of our simulation-based products used across pulp, paper, energy and other process industries.
* You will occasionally travel to support project or customer needs .

**Preferred Qualifications**
----------------------------

* You have a Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in engineering, preferably with a focus on modelling and simulation, control engineering or programming or you bring equivalent professional experience.
* You bring experience or knowledge in Python or other programming language especially with model/analytics focus.
* You have knowledge in Dymola or other modeling environments.
* You have process knowledge in pulp, paper or energy which is considered meritorious.
* You speak Swedish fluently and have strong written and spoken English skills.

**To succeed in this role, you will require the following:**
------------------------------------------------------------

You will excel by combining strong analytical thinking with creativity and a drive to innovate in simulation and production-oriented technologies. Your ability to work collaboratively, structure your work and contribute ideas will be essential in developing advanced training simulators, digital twins and analytical tools. A genuine interest in industrial processes and modern simulation technologies is an important part of thriving in this fast-evolving domain.


We also expect you to align with Valmet’s Leadership Principles - practical behaviors that guide how we lead, collaborate, and succeed together:


* **Take accountability** – Act with ownership, set clear expectations and follow through
* **Lead with courage** – Champion change, try bold ideas and learn quickly
* **Build on trust** – Listen to understand, be open, and create psychological safety
* **Collaborate for growth** – Work across boundaries, value diverse perspectives and focus on customer value

**We offer**
------------

You will join a dynamic and forward-thinking team that works at the forefront of product development for training simulators and digital twins supporting operators and industrial processes in pulp, paper and energy sectors. Your work will be varied, meaningful and include extensive collaboration with teams and customers around the world.


Valmet provides an inspiring and international work environment where innovation and collaboration are central to everything we do. You will have opportunities for professional development, flexible working conditions and access to a range of local employee benefits that support wellbeing and long-term growth.


**Want to know more?**
----------------------

Did we catch your interest? For further information, please contact Lars Almkvist, Senior Manager of Process Simulation: lars.almkvist@valmet.com


Last application date by **April 17, 2026** by filling in our online application form.


Please also attach your CV to the application.


We will start interviews before the application deadline so please submit your interest at your earliest convenience.


Collective agreement for senior salaried employees will be utilized in this position.


We perform background checks and alcohol/drug testing for all employees in Sweden, in line with our commitment to a safe and secure workplace.


### **When everything works together**

### **Valmet is where the best talent from a wide variety of backgrounds comes together. With over 19,000 professionals around the world, we are the leading global developer and supplier of technologies, automation and services for the pulp, paper and energy industries, and serve an even wider base of process industries with our automation systems and flow control solutions. Our commitment to moving our customers’ performance forward requires creativity, technological innovations, service know-how – and above all, teamwork.**

### **Join the team!** **www.valmet.com/careers**
company_description: Valmet has extensive technological know-how and a broad process understanding in solution related to the pulp, paper and energy industries.

title: Test Engineer
description:
At Tata Technologies we make product development dreams a reality by designing, engineering and validating the products of tomorrow for the world’s leading manufacturers. Due to our continued growth, we are now recruiting for a Test Engineer to strengthen our team in Gothenburg.
  
The Role
  
Experienced Software Test Engineer with a strong focus on validating automotive systems using HIL rigs (Component, Core, Domain levels). Experienced in HIL automation with tools such as Automation Desk or vTESTstudio, and skilled in integrating test scripts within CI/CD pipelines. Demonstrated expertise in performing smoke testing to ensure software stability, proficient in executing system and function-level testing, maintaining structured test strategies using requirement management tools like DOORS and System Weaver (Car Weaver). Skilled in test case development, execution, and verdict updates. Experienced in system safety testing / reporting and actively support test case automation while contributing to manual testing efforts. Adept at documenting test activities in prescribed storage systems to ensure traceability and compliance with process standards.
  
Area of Responsibility
  
1. Testing
  
Perform various types of tests to ensure complete functional coverage of the Steering & Brakes system.
  
Plan test strategies aligned with each software delivery cycle.
  
In case of issues, capture relevant logs from the HIL system and create detailed issue tickets.
  
Coordinate with the software development team to communicate identified issues and ensure timely resolution.
  
Actively participate in software meetings and provide feedback based on testing outcomes.
  
  

2. Automation
  
Collaborate with the integration team to integrate test cases into nightly test runs.
  
Identify test areas suitable for automation and propose automation solutions.
  
Monitor and analyse test results from daily executions.
  
Identify test cases suitable for inclusion in CI/CD pipelines for continuous testing.
  
  

3. Documentation & Compliance
  
Maintain traceability between requirements, models, and test cases in Doors or System Weaver.
  
Documentation of test verdicts from each release.
  
Support to create Safety related test documentation as per ISO 26262 standard.
  
  

Knowledge / Experience

title: Electrical Design Head
description:
Gemkom Engineering and Machinery Filial is a newly established branch of the Turkish company Gemkom. It is a leading engineering and manufacturing company that operates in a number of areas and in various ways within the steel industry.
  
We are participating in a project where Stegra AB establishes a steel mill in Norra Svartbyn in Boden where steel will be produced through an almost fossil-free process using hydrogen gas. Our mission is, among other things, to install machines used in steel production and includes work in mechanics, electronics and plumbing.
  
We now want to employ an Electrical Design Head. The work tasks may include but are not limited to:
  
JOB DESCRIPTION
  
**Electrical Systems Design:** Collaborate with engineers and other stakeholders to design electrical systems for buildings, infrastructure or industrial projects. This includes designing power distribution systems, lighting systems, communication systems, and fire alarm systems.
  
* Drafting and Documentation: Use computer-aided design (CAD) software to create detailed drawings and schematics of electrical systems. Ensure that drawings are accurate and clearly depict the layout and specifications of electrical components.
* Technical Analysis: Perform technical analysis to ensure that electrical designs meet project requirements, adhere to industry standards, and comply with building codes and regulations. This may involve conducting load calculations, voltage drop analysis, and short-circuit analysis.
* Material Selection: Assist in selecting appropriate electrical components and materials based on project requirements, budget constraints, and technical specifications. Coordinate with suppliers to procure materials and equipment needed for the project.
* Coordination with Other Disciplines: Collaborate with architects, structural engineers, mechanical engineers, and other professionals involved in the construction project to ensure that electrical designs are integrated seamlessly with other building systems.
* Quality Assurance: Conduct site inspections and reviews to ensure that electrical installations are carried out according to the approved designs and specifications. Identify and resolve any discrepancies or issues that may arise during the construction phase.
* Technical Analysis: Perform technical analysis to ensure that electrical designs are optimized for efficiency, reliability, and cost-effectiveness. This may involve conducting load calculations, voltage drop analysis, short-circuit analysis, and energy efficiency assessments.
* Specification Development: Prepare technical specifications and drawings detailing the requirements for electrical equipment, materials, and installation methods. Specify appropriate standards, codes, and regulations that must be followed to ensure compliance and quality assurance.
* Equipment Selection: Select suitable electrical components, equipment, and materials based on project requirements, performance criteria, and budget constraints. Evaluate options for transformers, switchgear, circuit breakers, wiring, lighting fixtures, and control systems to meet project specifications.
* Preparing /Collecting / Preserving the necessarily documents for finishing the electirification related documents after each related Handover/Completition Process
* Attending meetings to solve any technical issues related the Electrification Works


QUALIFICATIONS (not mandatory)
  
* We are looking for Electrical Design Head , who are prone to team work within GEMKOM Engineering and Machinery Filial in a project that will last until DECEMBER 2027 in BODEN, Sweden.
* Experienced Design Engineer will be Recruited in Steel Structure Construction Projects
* At least 5 years of experience in Steel Structure Construction ; Contracting works, Electrical Project -Mechanical Equipment Power Lines Drawing and commissioning.
* Having the ability and experience to work in accordance with ISO EN Norms
* Able to read Technical Drawings and Projects, prone to Teamwork
* Able to read Autocad Layout / Section view drawing of Medium voltage substation from 6,5 kV ,10 kV, 33 kV.
* An electrical design head plays a crucial role in the construction project, particularly in ensuring that the electrical systems are designed efficiently, safely, and in compliance with relevant codes and regulations. Here's a general job description for an electrical design technician in a construction project:
* Being able to Read electrical design specifications and technical drawing

title: Join Our Team as a SW Engineer
description:
About the Role
  
We are seeking a highly motivated and skilled Automotive Software Engineer to join our engineering team. In this role, you will be responsible for the full software development lifecycle of embedded systems for automotive applications, from requirement analysis through to qualification testing. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams and work independently to deliver high-quality software components.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
* Analyze software and hardware requirements for automotive embedded systems.
* Design system architecture, detailed modules, and software interfaces.
* Develop, test, and integrate embedded software, including hardware drivers and bootloaders.
* Conduct unit testing, integration testing, and qualification testing in compliance with automotive standards.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support system bring-up and debugging.
* Document design specifications and test procedures.
* Work efficiently both independently and as part of a collaborative team.


What You'll Bring
  
* 3+ years of experience in automotive embedded systems development.
* Proficient in C/C++ programming; scripting experience in Python, Shell, or Perl.
* Strong understanding of microcontrollers, device drivers, and embedded systems.
* Hands-on experience with bootloaders, cross compilers, and toolchains.
* Familiarity with software development lifecycle and working with hardware manuals, schematics, and data sheets.
* Practical experience with automotive communication protocols: SPI, CAN, LIN, FlexRay, Ethernet.
* Experience with debugging tools, simulators, emulators, and test equipment.
* Team player with excellent self-management and communication skills.


Nice to Have
  
* Experience with AUTOSAR Classic Platform development.
* Familiarity with AUTOSAR Configuration Tools (e.g., DaVinci, ECU Spectrum).
* Understanding of Functional Safety concepts (ISO 26262).
* Experience with multi-threaded and multitasking systems.
* Knowledge of Automotive SPICE or CMMI frameworks.


**Benefits & Perks:**  

* Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses.
* Health, dental, and vision insurance.
* Flexible work hours and remote work options.
* Learning and development opportunities


. Work with a talented and passionate team in a collaborative environment.

title: Senior Test Automation Engineer Automotive
description:
**Company Description**  

SEGULA Technologies is a leading engineering group with a global presence that enhances competitiveness across all major industrial sectors: automotive, aerospace, energy, rail, maritime, pharmaceuticals, and petrochemicals. The group operates in 30 countries with 140 offices worldwide and maintains strong relationships with its clients through the expertise of its 15,000 employees. Innovation lies at the heart of SEGULA’s strategy, with large-scale projects spanning from early-stage studies to industrialization and production.

 **Job Description**  

We are currently looking for a Test Engineer on behalf of our client in the automotive industry. You should have 10 years + experience.


In this role, you will work with testing of safety-critical functions, contributing to the development of future transport solutions.

* Perform both manual and automated testing of safety functions
* Write, execute, and analyze test cases
* Ensure quality and compliance in safety-critical systems
* Work closely with cross-functional teams within development and testing


Start ASAP

 **Qualifications**  

Your profile

* Experience as a Test Engineer, preferably within the automotive industry
* Strong knowledge of ISO 26262
* Experience with both manual and automated testing
* Understanding of software and hardware, especially related to HIL environments
* Python, Linux, Vector CANoe
* Local work experience

  

Meritorious

* Experience in a leading or coordinating test role
* Strong initiative and proactive mindset
* Good collaboration and communication skills
* Ability to independently troubleshoot and fix HIL rigs

 **Additional Information** **What we offer**

* Secure employment and working conditions in accordance with Swedish labor law

* Assignments with SEGULA’s valued clients—leading companies in their fields

* Become part of a growing network of skilled engineers

To thrive in this role, we believe you enjoy collaborating, are proactive, and take initiative. To apply for this position, you must have a valid work permit within the European Union. We value diversity and equality and place great importance on your personal qualities. Recruitment is ongoing, so we welcome your application today!

title: Senior Validation and Verification Engineer
description:
**Be part of something altogether life-changing**
-------------------------------------------------


Working at Cytiva in the Life Sciences industry means being at the forefront of providing new solutions to transform human health. Our incredible customers undertake life-saving activities ranging from fundamental biological research to developing innovative vaccines, new medicines, and cell and gene therapies.


At Cytiva you will be able to continuously improve yourself and us – working on challenges that truly matter with people that care for each other, our customers, and their patients. With associates across 40 countries, Cytiva is a place where every day is a learning opportunity – so you can grow your career and expand your skills in the long term.

**Cytiva is proud to work alongside a community of nine fellow Danaher Life Sciences companies. Together, we’re pioneering the future of science and medicine, developing products that enable researchers in the fight to save lives.**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 **What you'll do:**

* Plan, develop, and execute functional test strategies for customized BioProcess Solutions, including procedure development and ownership of functional testing activities.
* Review, approve, and provide quality oversight on test protocols created by other test engineers, ensuring compliance and consistency.
* Troubleshoot complex technical issues, recommend corrective actions, and support service teams with maintenance, repair, and on‑site customer installations.
* Support customers and suppliers through technical education, Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT), and ongoing collaboration across the product lifecycle.
* Maintain and continuously improve test facilities, test equipment, and testing capabilities to support current and future project needs.
* When appointed as Team Lead, plan and lead team activities, manage short‑ and mid‑term (3‑month) resource planning, act as escalation point and coordination partner to planners and project managers, and run regular pulse meetings to ensure timely portfolio delivery.

**Who you are:**

* Engineer (Swedish level of “Gymnasieingenjör” or “högskoleingenjör”) in electrical engineering or equivalent technical discipline, with strong hands‑on experience.
* Solid expertise in hardware and software testing, including verification, validation, and work within regulated environments (e.g., GMP).
* High technical competence with strong understanding of control software and preferably GEHC Bioprocess products.
* Structured, analytical problem‑solver with a demonstrated ability to deliver results and manage multiple priorities.
* Service‑minded team player with strong communication skills, cultural awareness, and the ability to collaborate across functions and geographies.
* Natural leader and self‑starter with the ability to mentor others, energize teams, and operate effectively in both individual contributor and team‑lead roles.

Join our winning team today. Together, we’ll accelerate the real-life impact of tomorrow’s science and technology. We partner with customers across the globe to help them solve their most complex challenges, architecting solutions that bring the power of science to life.


For more information, visit www.danaher.com.
company_description: Cytiva is a global provider of technologies and services that advance and accelerate the development and manufacture of therapeutics, addressing urgent needs and helping save patient lives.

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer (AI-Native)
description:
**Fleet Operations · Stockholm (Hybrid)**

**YOUR MISSION AT VOI**
-----------------------


You'll be joining the team that builds tools for Voi's Fleet Specialists: the people keeping scooters charged, balanced, and available across European cities. The team works on navigation, daily shift planning, and the routing intelligence that helps specialists work efficiently in the field. The stack is Kotlin and Jetpack Compose on mobile, Go on the backend, with VROOM for route optimisation.

  

What's different about this role is the expectation around AI tooling. You'll have access to the latest and greatest tools (currently we have Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex), and we expect you to use them seriously. We expect you to move across the full stack, pick up unfamiliar territory quickly, and ship end-to-end without waiting for someone else to unblock you. We care less about which layers of the stack you already know deeply, and more about how well you close the gaps.

  

Day-to-day this means:

* Taking features from brief to production: writing mobile UI, backend logic, and API contracts, using AI tooling to cover the parts you know less well
* Holding a high bar for code quality even when a lot of the code is AI-generated
* Getting involved in system design early, not just picking up tickets once decisions are made
* Working directly with product managers, designers, and Fleet Specialists to understand what actually needs building

**WHAT YOU NEED TO EMBARK**
---------------------------

* First and foremost, you're a strong engineer. The AI tooling expectation in this role only makes sense on top of solid foundations - someone who can read, reason about, and take ownership of code regardless of where it came from.
* 5+ years building complex software end-to-end, with real ownership over the full cycle - not just implementation, but scoping, architecture, and seeing things through to production.
* Concrete experience shipping products with AI coding agents. We’ll want to talk about specific projects: what you built, what the AI contributed, and what you had to do yourself.
* Some experience on the frontend or mobile side. Android (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose) is closest to our stack, but iOS, Kotlin Multiplatform, Flutter, and Progressive Web Apps all count. Strong backend engineers with meaningful frontend exposure are equally welcome. The expectation is that you can work across the stack, not that you arrive already knowing all of it.
* Solid engineering fundamentals. AI-generated code still needs to be readable, testable, and maintainable. You know the difference between code that works and code that holds up, and you don't lose that judgement when an AI is generating most of it.
* Experience in product teams where engineers help decide what to build, not just how. You've taken vague requirements, shaped them into something concrete, and driven the work through to delivery.

**WHY VOI?**
------------

**Voi is Europe's #1 micromobility company, and the mission of getting cars off city streets is one we take seriously. Beyond that:**

* Our employee options program gives you a stake in what we're building
* The team is small enough that your decisions matter, and experienced enough that you'll learn from the people around you
* You'll work on a modern stack: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Go, and VROOM on the product side, with Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex as everyday tools, not afterthoughts
* The tools you build affect how specialists work on the street every day

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:

title: Data Engineer
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Rollen:**
* Ingestion och modellering av data: arbeta med verkliga dataanvändningsfall för att bygga pipelines, applicera anonymisering och skapa återanvändbara dataprodukter i Databricks
* Skapa golden paths: definiera standardmönster och verktyg för publicering, versionering och konsumtion av dataprodukter — inklusive SDK:er, dokumentation och mallar
* Operationalisera compliance: bygga in funktioner för integritet och governance i plattformen (t.ex. GDPR, RtBF, dataklassificering, anonymiseringsramverk)
* Samarbeta tvärfunktionellt: arbeta nära plattforms-, infrastruktur-, ingenjörs- och analysteam för att göra plattformen eller dess dataprodukter användbara, säkra och värdeskapande från dag ett.


**Ska-krav:**
* Har 7+ års praktisk erfarenhet som software- eller data engineer
* Har djup erfarenhet av Databricks, inklusive Unity Catalog, Delta Lake, workspace-setup och data engineering
* Är bekant med Azure, särskilt i relation till att köra Databricks i Azure.
* Har jobbat med Terraform och Infrastructure as Code-verktyg
* Förstår data governance och integritetskrav — och har implementerat lösningar för anonymisering, pseudonymisering eller åtkomstkontroll
* Har erfarenhet av orkestrering av pipelines och jobb i Databricks-miljö
* Djup erfarenhet av Python och SQL, samt CLI-verktyg och Git-baserade arbetsflöden
* Är pragmatisk — du balanserar struktur och snabbhet, och gillar att leverera iterativt
* Gillar att samarbeta mellan team, dokumentera ditt arbete och hjälpa andra att lyckas


**Meriterande:**
* Har byggt eller integrerat datasetkataloger, verktyg för metadataspårning eller Backstage-plugins
* Har kunskap och praktisk erfarenhet att jobba i en data mesh, intern plattformsdesign eller developer experience
* Har erfarenhet av Power BI, datamodellering för analys och slutanvändares databehov


**Sista ansökningdag:** 
 26-03-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Senior Software Engineer Backend - Cloud
description:
**Join Truecaller – The place where innovation meets impact!**
 Truecaller's mission is to build trust in communication by making it safer, smarter, and more efficient. Born in Sweden, trusted by the world, and here's why we stand out:
   

  

* We are trusted by over 450 million active users every month across 190+ countries
* We identify over 15 billion calls daily, helping users avoid spam and scams
* We are powered by a team of 450+ employees from 45+ nationalities


 We always look for people who take initiative, own their work, and keep raising the bar. An entrepreneurial mindset matters here, especially when it turns bold ideas into real actions. We stay collaborative and focused, always searching for smarter paths forward. If you want to make an impact and grow with a team that inspires millions, you'll fit right in.
   

  

**The role:**
 You will be joining a highly impactful, cross-functional foundational team that sits at the intersection of our Identity, Infrastructure, and Localization platforms. We build and maintain the core systems that securely authenticate our users, scale our backend infrastructure, and power our global reach through our internal translation framework.
   

  

 As a Senior Software Engineer, Backend, you will join the Cloud Infrastructure Backend team, responsible for the foundational systems that securely power Truecaller for over 450 million users worldwide. You will collaborate on our most critical identity and core infrastructure domains, including our Authorization systems (handling peaks of 2.7M requests/second), our internal phone verification service (processing 51k RPS with sub-5ms p99 latency), and our massive business event ingestion pipelines (producing up to 676k events/sec).
   

  

 In this role, you will also take primary ownership of our internal Translation Framework—a sophisticated CI/CD orchestrator that seamlessly integrates AI translations and linguist feedback to localize our platform globally. Writing primarily in
 **Scala and Golang** 
 , you will solve complex distributed systems challenges at a massive scale, building and optimizing features to ensure our core infrastructure remains secure, resilient, and highly performant.
   

  

**What you'll do:**
* Design and develop high-volume, low-latency services and cope with the challenge of working in a distributed environment.
* Operate mission-critical services at high availability.
* Collaborate across business units and drive solutions.
* Explore new solutions and technologies.
* Build a scalable and reliable system.


**What you bring in:**
* 5+ years of backend experience with languages like Java, Scala, or Go, along with the willingness and excitement to work primarily in Scala and Golang.
* Experience of working with scalable, highly available, real-time distributed systems
* Experience of working with non-relational databases
* Good understanding of data structures and algorithms
* Mentoring/ Leadership skills
* Excellent communication skills in English.
* Ability to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.


**It would be great if you also have:**
* Domain experience in Localization systems or Identity/Authentication protocols (e.g., OAuth, SSO, IAM).
* Experience building systems in the Google Cloud Platform
* Experience with virtualization environments, e.g., Docker
* Experience with systems for managing containerized applications, e.g., Kubernetes
* Experience with Cassandra and Kafka.


**What we offer:**
 We support growth through learning resources, leadership programs, mentoring, and real hands-on work. People can move between teams and projects to build new skills and keep things interesting. We offer clear internal mobility and a transparent path for progression, with leaders who stay involved and provide guidance throughout the year. In addition, you will benefit from:
 
* **A comprehensive compensation package:** 
 We offer a competitive salary, 30 days of paid vacation, private health insurance, parental leave top-up, pension, and wellness contributions.
* **Modern tools to do your best work:** 
 Choose your preferred computer and phone within our budget, so you can work comfortably and efficiently.
* **A people-focused office culture:** 
 We value in-person collaboration and follow an office-first model, with some flexibility. Our offices offer a vibrant environment with opportunities to learn, connect, and recharge, from breakfast, lunch, and well-stocked snack stations and quiet spaces to team activities such as movie nights, tech meetups, and cultural events. There's something for everyone.
* **Truecaller's "Lab Days" offer a space for imagination:** 
 5 times per year for 3 days, where everyone steps away from their normal tasks to explore new, bold ideas and build things they've always wanted to. It's a space where curiosity leads the way, and prototypes take shape. Some concepts even make it into production, and a few have grown into real features used by millions today. Lab Days allow you to be creative, learn fast, and help shape Truecaller's future.


**Come as you are:**
 Truecaller is committed to building a diverse and inclusive team. We believe that a wide range of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences strengthens our products and our culture. No matter where you're from, what language you speak, or how you identify, we value what makes you unique and would love to get to know you.
   

  

 Check out Life at Truecaller - Behind the code: https://www.instagram.com/lifeattruecaller/
   

  

**Sounds like a great opportunity?**
 We will fill the position as soon as we find the right candidate, so please send your application as soon as possible. As part of the recruitment process, we will conduct a background check.
   

  

**We only accept applications in English.**

title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
**Senior AI Engineer role - Established product company - Stockholm 💡** 




  





 I'm working in collaboration with a well-established product company in Stockholm, who are disrupting and transforming a typically corporate, enterprise financial sector with a digital-first, user-focused web & mobile apps!
 



  





 With over 100 people in the company, 130,000 active paying customers across Sweden, they are a super stable organisation with an established product and a strong reputation. The majority of your time will be spent building features, designing scalable systems, and improving the overall product experience, whilst collaborating with different product teams, senior leadership and business stakeholders to drive AI product development!

* Improve scalability, reliability, and maintainability of distributed systems
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate product ideas into production-ready solutions
* Support the evaluation and integration of AI capabilities within the product
